reviews.text: She was amazing and went far and beyond to help me when I needed it most. Worth every penny!

Viktoria was great at guiding me through one of the most stressful times.  She was reassuring and made me feel very comfortable through the whole process of my divorce.
Thank you for your guidance and comfort.

Viktoria did in 4 months what my first lawyer couldn't do in a year and a half.  She listened to my concerns and addressed them.  She didn't let my soon to be ex and his bully attorney run all over me like the first attorney had.  She documented my husbands behavior and got him to get things done.  And because things were actually getting done, it is going to cost me half of what the other lawyer had charged me.  Wish I had started with her to begin with.

Being self-represented in Family Court, I reached out to Viktoria for a consultation on analyzing the issues in my case and developing a strategy to present in court.  Viktoria understood the challenge before me and helped me frame my argument before the judge.  Viktoria kept me focused on the issues and pointed out a discrepancy in the judge’s Tentative Ruling (TR) that I did not notice.  Viktoria coached me on how to address the discrepancy and how to phrase my issue to get the judge’s attention.  Thanks to Viktoria’s coaching, the judge completely removed that portion of the TR.  Viktoria also helped me frame my overall presentation on the other remaining issues such that I could tell the judge was seriously considering what I was saying.  Without Viktoria’s coaching, my presentation before the judge would not have been as successful.  Viktoria was also helpful in referring me to the appropriate Family Law codes for my further review and growth.  I appreciate Viktoria’s patience, and understanding in seeing me through this, and her sense of humor is a plus.

Viktoria helped my daughter recoup funds stolen in a Family Trust scam. Noelle had struggled with this family betrayal for years, and another attorney had not fought for her the way Viktoria did. There are many choices for Attorneys, but Viktoria goes above and beyond in her efforts to achieve justice and what is fair. We felt completely at ease under Viktoria’s legal expertise and we achieved all that Noelle deserved in her settlement. We will always turn to Viktoria for future legal needs.

reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the kind review.

reviews.text:
While on my daily morning walk, I was struck by a vehicle which stopped on top of my lower body.I ended up in the hospital with injuries to my leg,shoulder, knees,back and a concussion.
I was in the emergency room with my wife, in pain, scared of what I was going to do next. My job, bills and my quality of life. My daughter-law recommended the law offices of Rose, Klein and Maria’s LLP. I was contacted by Bill Grewe.
I had never had a need for a lawyer and didn’t know what to expect.
From the beginning Bill was amazing. He put my wife and I at ease. I explained what happened. He explained the process to us and genuinely cared about us and again, made us at ease. He kept us informed every step of the way.
Not only is Bill Grewe a good lawyer, he is a good person. We will definitely recommend you to our family and friends if the need ever arises.
Thank You Bill for all your hard work
Eddie & Terri
reviews.ownerResponse: Eddie & Terri, thank you so much for sharing your story. We’re really glad to hear you’re on the mend after such a scary experience. It means a lot to know Bill was able to make things easier for you and guide you with care. That’s the kind of support we hope every client feels. Thanks again for your kind words and for recommending us. Wishing you both a smooth recovery!

reviews.text: Are you aware that your business is being advertised utilizing highly unethical and malicious bot networks that have been attacking a my little pony fanfiction website alongside actual scams and illegal services? This is a great look for a law firm!
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you for bringing this to our attention. We want to clarify that our firm has no affiliation with the website you mentioned, nor have we ever advertised on that site or through any bot networks. If you are a defendant dealing with this firm, retain counsel.
Also contact the Ventura County Self-Help Legal Access Center for free assistance.

In my experience, the firm was unwilling to work toward a cooperative resolution to avoid eviction, even when brief additional time would have solved the issue. Verbal commitments were unreliable; unless terms were in writing, they were not honored. We were given a move-out timeframe, requested a short (1–2 hour) extension, and were refused. We later learned the firm filed the eviction electronically at around midnight—earlier than the date and time we understood to be agreed.

The firm declined to prepare routine forms that could have facilitated an agreed outcome, instead directing us to file at our own expense (approximately $100–$200 per person). The Self-Help Center indicated the attorney could have prepared the same paperwork. We explained we lacked funds for filing fees and were willing to vacate by a reasonable time, but the firm would not cooperate—even though the client’s stated goal was simply for us to leave the apartment.

With such a confusing and ridiculous court system, you need support and knowledge how to navigate it. You could be doing all the “right” things and still not see “results” you’re seeking. So having someone who has an outside perspective, and deals with a multitude of court proceedings daily, really becomes the help you’ve needed. And although no attorney can guarantee certain outcomes, Cynthia will absolutely have your back.
Her professionalism, confidence, and pure compassion will surely put you at ease. She is quick to comfort and is either already in constant contact or will easily be available for whatever you need. She has a wonderful staff, Sereth and Christina, who also extend their support and are so warm-hearted.

reviews.text: Randall Kaiden is incredibly conscientious, unusually ethical, and does extremely thorough research before he engages in estate and elder law planning. He is also an innovative thinker and one of the only estate elder law attorneys in our community who truly understands public benefits. In my parents situation, his knowledge, patience and expertise was not only useful but critical because they are not US Citizens, but do receive Medicare, Medi-Cal and Supplemental Security Income through the Qualified Medicare Beneficiary program. Loss of those benefits would have been devastating for our family, but was exactly what we were facing. That's because my brother passed away without a will or trust, leaving us in no-where-land. Mr. Kaiden was the only lawyer who understood how critical the loss of these benefits would have been for my parents, if not handled properly. Truly, the issues brought up by the untimely passing of my brother were plentiful and complicated. Thankfully though, Mr. Kaiden was there to save us. He's really a special type of professional and I speak for my whole family when I say that we highly recommended him.

reviews.text: Jeremy, Ricky, Arianna and Jamal. This team really went all out to help my son deal with his case. But they also understand mental health disorders, how these clients can get entangled with the criminal justice system, and the various court or county programs that can help minimize their trauma. If you're looking for a legal team that is compassionate but professional, you can't go wrong with Lessem, Newstat & Tooson, LLP. As the former Executive Director of NAMI Ventura County, I recommend this firm enthusiastically.

Since I have no experiences with legal claims or court cases he walked me though exactly what to do as far as where to go, how to file, who to go after, and what to bring to court. He was very understanding and compassionate about my situation. After getting his legal advice I feel a lot more confident about my case coming up!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for allowing me to assist you, Keisha.  In California, attorneys are not legally permitted to appear in Small Claims court matters unless they are representing a corporation or themselves.  However, that does not preclude my helping clients like you completely prepare themselves to do a great job representing themselves in court.  By taking the time to explain who the judge is, what to say, who to subpoena to appear, what evidence to bring, and how to organize to win a case, I can give you the confidence to go in and do a good job.  I think you will do a great job in Small Claims court.

reviews.text:
We were being sued in small claims court for something we didn't do. We were very nervous. We didn't know what to say or how to protect ourselves against a blatant lie.

We got an appointment with Mr. Fox, and he was a tremendous help. He told us what the strengths of our case were, how present it, what the rules in small claims court were, and he answered a million questions. He brought up the things the other side might say and told us how to answer them. He told us how judges think and how to word things to get the judge's attention. He explained how to be patient when the other side is speaking and how to address their lies when it is our turn to speak again.

When we left Mr. Fox's office, we felt much more calm, we were equipped with a game plan and ready to tackle the situation. Our court date is still in the future, but we are very happy with Mr. Fox's help.

We will certainly contact Mr. Fox again if we have any future legal problems and we highly recommend him.
reviews.ownerResponse: Mr. and Mrs. Potter, thank you.  Litigation, be it as serious as a Superior Court lawsuit or as simple as a small claims case can be an anxiety inducing experience.  The job of a good attorney is not only knowing the law, but is also remembering that we are all people with lives, families, jobs, hopes and dreams, and the legal process may cause us to worry about these things important to our lives.  A good attorney should guide you through the litigation process with the objective of explaining it in a way that helps relieve anxiety by education, preparation, and reassurance.  Educated clients are good clients and good litigants.

reviews.ownerResponse: To the public: Law firms occasionally receive requests to provide legal services from persons who, for varying business and professional reasons, we decline to represent.  These individuals are not clients; When a law firm declines a request to provide legal representation, we understand this creates hurt feelings. Due to the ethical standards of the legal profession, without the expressed approval of any individual, we cannot respond further to such online reviews.

reviews.text: I'm in the middle of a miserable divorce from a former Divorce Lawyer.  I have gone through numerous attorneys.  Paul Zahn and Monica Frye are by far, the best attorneys I've come across.  Regardless of the outcome, these lawyers are excellent!  If they take all my money and I still lose, I will feel confident they tried their best and did the best job anyone could have done for me.  No one is guaranteed an outcome in law.  There are too many factors at play.  They bill appropriately for their time.  Some divorces simply require more time than others.  They are not anywhere near the most expensive attorneys I've come across but they do strike me as being the best!  Most lawyers have clients deal with their assistants the majority of the time.  At Zahn Law Offices, you deal directly with your lawyer.  You might think this costs slightly more than using an assistant but interestingly, it probably doesn't as you're not billed for the time the assistant is conveying the information to the lawyer.  Zahn Law Offices are definitely worth every penny!  Paul and Monica are both brilliant people and each one brings different strengths to the table.  I am confident they are doing the best job any lawyer could do for me.  Donna, the receptionist, is also wonderful.  For the record:  I have no prior relationship with anyone from this firm.  I found them from their add on a Google search.
reviews.ownerResponse:

Thank you for your wonderful review. We appreciate that you took the time to post this review and we remain committed to getting you the best possible outcome on your case (without taking all your money).

Paul Zahn
Managing Attorney

If my son is on the phone with me or if this meeting where to take place face to face, why couldn't I explain the situation we are having?  The whole reason we are looking for an attorney is because my son when speaking tends to word things incorrectly or not say everything and that is why I would be the one to step in and explain with him present.. Needless to say the conversation ended.  Never even got past the lady whom answered the phone.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you for your comment, but our office policy is for the free consultation to be for the client, not a third party. This was explained to you when you called. I am sorry that you are upset with this policy, but as attorney-client confidentiality is important to any successful representation, this is the policy that we have implemented. If your son wants to tell you what was said after his consultation, he is welcome to do so, but that is his choice, not our choice.

I am sorry that you were upset by our policy, but it is done to benefit the client. Perhaps there are other attorneys who might be a better fit for you and your family. We wish you the best of luck in your son's case.

Paul Zahn
Managing Attorney

I had the honor of being represented by Gina Clemow and the team at Hiepler & Hiepler, and I cannot recommend them highly enough.

From my very first contact with Dierdre Powell, I felt cared for—she was always so helpful and remembered my name every time I called. Erica Hurtado patiently explained the legal process and answered every question with clarity and compassion. Even Mark Brantingham stepped in to provide legal support along the way—it was truly a full team effort on my behalf.

From the beginning, Gina and her team provided structure, support, and clear guidance that helped me feel grounded during such a stressful time. I was also deeply moved when Mark and Michelle Hiepler personally offered their support and guidance during the mediation process.

Gina was able to keep my case out of trial and guided us through mediation instead. Throughout the process, she was calm, empathetic, and genuinely cared about my well-being. At the same time, she was assertive, effective, and relentless in dealing with the agency we were up against.

What stood out most was Gina’s perfect balance—her compassion for me paired with her fierce advocacy on my behalf. She helped me feel supported every step of the way and fought hard to achieve the best possible outcome.

I will be forever grateful for Gina Clemow and the entire Hiepler & Hiepler team. They are exceptional.
Gina Cole

--

I couldn’t thank Gina enough for everything she has done for me and my case. After having a discouraging experience with a previous attorney, working with Gina completely changed everything. She was responsive, timely, thorough, and genuinely cared. She answered all my questions and made sure I understood every step of the way, she was patient as well and I really appreciated that. Gina made a difficult process feel manageable and gave me back a little piece of mind that I had lost after realizing not much was done with my case previously. I'm incredibly grateful for her support and professionalism. She has truly made my experience with Hiepler & Hiepler great, and I would wholeheartedly recommend her to anyone in need of legal representation.

Finding the right attorney can be overwhelming, but a skilled and compassionate legal team can make all the difference. The Law Office of Hieple & Hiepler not only understands the complexities of medical and legal issues but also advocated fiercely, ensuring the compensation which is deserved.

They are an experienced firm who will navigate the legal process with expertise, handling negotiations with insurance companies, gathering necessary medical evidence, and fighting for maximum recovery. The best professionals in this field are not only knowledgeable but also empathetic, recognizing the profound impact a brain injury can have on a person’s life and future, which they are.

If you’re seeking representation, you will experience the representation from this firm as top notch and they will fight for your future.

I was beyond impressed by the services provided by Hiepler & Hiepler, especially Ryan who educated me on the process, strategies, and kept me informed every step of the way during an overwhelming time for me and my family. Professionalism A+, Responsiveness A+, Knowledge A+, and Outcome A+. Thank you Hiepler & Hiepler.

I have referred clients and utilized the services of the Hiepler and Hiepler law firm a couple of times. I could not have been more pleased with the responsiveness, expert advice, and support I received. They are experienced, committed and caring. They are the only firm I will consider. They are complete professionals. Great team!

Aweful experience.  I was handed a folder full of "how much money and how many magazines I've been in". Then they declined our case even though a ventura doctor was the main cause of my father's sudden passing because it wouldn't make the law office millions and he told us Ventura county is allowed to hire D- doctors.  Now we lost our dad, the  doctor kept practicing and my mom struggled for years because my dad was the bread winner.
reviews.ownerResponse: Dear Holly, we extend our sincere sympathy for the loss of your dear father. Unfortunately, we generally do not accept medical malpractice cases. If you requested our services, we generally would have declined representation on that basis and referred you to an attorney specializing in this field.  We have researched our intake calls and we have not found your name, so perhaps your negative experience was actually at another law firm, and you have misidentified us in your review.  If you were in contact with us and had a negative experience, we do sincerely apologize for that. We wish you well, and if you were in communication with us, we are sorry for the tragic circumstances which brought us together.

reviews.text: They will always have your back !!!!!!
Quick response to my inquiry. Offered a referral to a law firm better suited to my need. Very professional. Took the time to listen to my issue and needs. I recommend them highly for a consultation.
Amazing attorney
Very professional and compassionate group of people. Thankful there are lawyers who care about people first. Highly recommend this firm!
Highly recommend this incredible firm. The attorneys are very professional and trustworthy!
My experience was nothing but positive. Mark was extremely helpful and took the time to really make sure I understood everything.
My husband and I have the highest regard for and utmost confidence in this firm. Rest assured that Hiepler & Hiepler will serve you with great integrity and professionalism.
The best firm in Oxnard if not Ventura County!
Incredible professionalism. There is no one I would rather have on my side than Hiepler & Hiepler. I could not recommend them enough.
An outstanding group of lawyers! Mark Hiepler is known not only for his expertise as an attorney but also for his character. The longevity of his team speaks for itself!

Mark is absolutely the most capable, sincere, humble, caring and straight forward attorney you could ever meet. He actually gives up his own time to carefully explain things to you that others often rush you through. Definitely a rare breed and of highest recommendation!

I was in a catastrophic bicycle versus truck accident in Santa Barbara County. My wife and I had numerous knowledgeable people refer us to Mark Hiepler and the Law Offices of Hiepler and Hiepler due to his knowledge, experience, and actual trials involving bike accidents. His experience proved helpful to us in not only handling the case but helping us ensure I was getting the best rehabilitation, care, surgical care, and he prepared my wife and I for the process of the law suit. We are grateful for the referral, the outcome, and the professional and friendship relationship that we hope to continue with he and his excellent team.

- R.W.

Montecito, CA
Mark is an oustanding attorney, as good as they come.

Michael Martin and Michael Pellegrini helped us win a construction defect mediation against a faulty roof installation done by August roofing. Michael's did a great job and we would hire them again without hesitation. You can feel confident going with this firm.

We have had a great experience working with this firm for both construction and employment law matters. Their team is extremely knowledgeable, responsive, and always provides clear, practical guidance.

A special thank you to Michael Martin, who has helped us for many years with construction law matters. His expertise, responsiveness, and practical advice have been invaluable to our business. The entire team is professional and a pleasure to work with. Highly recommend.

We want to commend and thank our attorneys James Perero and Sheri Valley of Myers Widders Gibson Jones & Feingold LLP in Ventura.  They have been very helpful advocates during a difficult time and complicated situation.  They proved to be an invaluable resource in a legal matter involving our auto insurance company which initially refused to meet their obligations for an accident that resulted in a personal injury. They handled our case with exceptional competency, expertise, and professionalism. We greatly appreciate their support and highly recommend their services.

Jason Knight is hands down the best attorney I have ever worked with. He's very bright, knowledgeable, communicative and knows how to get things completed in a timely manner. He far exceeded my expectations at every level. Thank you!

I had the LUCKY opportunity to do my trust with this is amazing professional,  kind , smart firm  Jason Knight from Myers Widders,Gibson,&Feingold  L.L.P. , And Michael M. To do my trust, it was easy , safe comfortable questions resolve , and piece of mind, I highly recommend them 100++++++++, thank u so much for the piece of mind. I have to mention Michael Meyer the legal assistant , she’s incredible helpful , and understands your case so the case goes very smooth and easy, thank u for your help dear Michael.-

Firstly, I need to state this was my 2nd hiring of this law firm. I first hired them in 2015 to handle my parents’ property held in trust. A family member was holding the property hostage essentially, and I ran out of money; therefore, I had to drop the lawsuit. Fast forward 7 years later, after the unexpected passing of my brother, and I re-hired the law firm with the recommendation of working with Sasha Collins, and Cari Potts……both respected in the courts and held in high esteem by their colleagues. These attorneys did not disappoint.
My other brother (co-trustee) and I didn’t always know what questions to ask, so it’s important to research that on your own as much as you can before starting.
Both Ms Collins, and Ms Potts answered our questions thoughtfully, and based on the law. Unfortunately, my brother and I were dealing with a very unhealthy family system, and that is not something attorneys are paid to address. That being said, it was extremely stressful interpersonally within the family. At times, my brother and I felt we had to nudge the attorneys to be more aggressive in their presentation to the judge, which they did, albeit reluctantly at times. That would be my one criticism, along with the attorneys’ paralegal(s) oftentimes not having correct information, eg. I missed several calls because the paralegal was using an outdated number despite my having given them updated info when we signed the legal contract; along with, getting beneficiary info incorrect more than once. But, it was remedied by the attorneys.
It was a lengthy journey, approximately 2 years (?) and the attorneys had given us an accurate timeline.
I would highly recommend this law firm, and either of these attorneys, Ms. Sasha Collins and Ms. Cari Potts. Our case was problematic from the onset, and they handled it with knowledge, grace, and expertise.
Thank You Both.

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
I’m deeply appreciative of Attorney Erik Feingold for his exceptional handling of my Thomas Fire settlement. His professionalism, attention to detail, and genuine care made a complex process smooth and successful. Truly first-class representation — I highly recommend him!
Jason Knight and Michael White are the best. They were both very patient and accommodating.
My husband and I were threatened legally over a contract dispute. Eric Feingold responded to our inquiries quickly and assuaged all of our fears. Can’t recommend enough.

Erik Feingold is, far and away, the best law professional I've gotten to work with. When unfortunate circumstances arose for my family and me, he was instrumental in protecting us. I give Erik my highest possible professional recommendation.

Working through our Stock Purchase project (including its associated NDA and Due Diligence Agreements) with Jacquelyn's team at MW was an absolute joy.  She handled every odd and complex turn in a timely manner both beautifully and professionally, providing helpful suggestions as needed throughout.

Her patience in navigating us successfully toward our end-game sale was impressive, truly needed, and enormously appreciated!

Sasha Collins, my attorney and her assistant Michael were not only professional but very warm and caring.  They made the process of estate planning straight-forward and easy.  They really listened, made suggestions and gave me what I wanted and needed.  All of my documents were filed in one binder, all labeled, and copies were sent digitally as well.  I am very satisfied with their work, which Is excellent by anyone's standards.

After losing our home in the Mountain Fire, Erik Feingold was an invaluable resource for assisting us in navigating complicated issues at a very difficult time. Beyond being an expert civil litigator, he is able to give wise and thoughtful advice. I have referred several friends to him for property and insurance litigation matters and every time, I hear back that they are as grateful as I have been to have him on their side.

I am grateful for the legal counsel I’ve received from MWGJ&F over the past few years.
Ms. Sasha Collins helped me navigate the trust administration of my parent’s estate, including a petition to the court to set up accommodations for my disabled brother. I had switched over to Ms. Collins after the first firm I consulted had been unsupportive and unwilling to help me carry out my parents’ wishes because the request was complicated. Sasha stepped in and made all the difference during a difficult transition.
Most recently, I turned to Ms. Jacquelyn Ruffin to help me set up my first LLC, review lease documents, and draft a sublease for my tenants. She listened to my priorities, gave solid advice, protected my interests, and helped me understand the process. She also kept an eye on my budget and informed me of her hours so I could best manage my startup budget.
Both attorneys demonstrated great communication skills, integrity, compassion, and attention to the needs of their clients. I highly recommend them and would look to the same firm for other areas of law I may need in the future.

Steven Lee, ESQ has assisted me twice over the last decade regarding disputes over monies owed after leaving two different organizations.  His approach, advice, and preparedness has helped me recover those monies plus penalties.  I would recommend Steven to those looking to recover any lost wages, bonuses, commissions, or other.

Had the pleasure of working with Jason Knight and Michael to create our Trust, Will, and Advanced Directives! The process was seamless, quick, and so easy. Also Mr. Knight took the time to explain all of the documents in a super efficient yet understandable manner so we left feeling comfortable, and also with an excellent understanding of what we had signed. Also Michael was so great and patient, helping us with the scheduling! We absolutely loved our experience and will definitely be keeping them in the family!

Steven Lee has been absolutely instrumental in helping me stay organized and protected as a small business owner. There are so many laws and standards to navigate when you're an employer—and Steven has made that process clear, manageable, and far less overwhelming.

He's incredibly responsive, knowledgeable, and easy to work with. Whether I’ve had a quick question or needed support on more complex issues, Steven has shown up with clarity, professionalism, and kindness every time.

If you're a business owner who wants to do right by your team and stay out of legal trouble, I highly recommend working with Steven and his firm. I’m so grateful to have him in my corner.

Needing to get a trust done I was referred to Sasha and they did a great job! The entire team was professional, warm, on top of it, and efficient. The entire process was smooth and easy. Everything was covered in detail so I could understand what was happening. I was very pleased with the service and I highly recommend them!

Today I had the pleasure of consulting with Ms. Valley who was incredibly knowledgeable, helpful, professional, and extremely supportive and compassionate. I am so thankful for her and will definitely refer to her in the future. Highly recommend wish I could leave 10 stars!

Steven Lee stepped in to help me review an employment letter when there was little time allotted.  He made himself available for phone calls to discuss and was very helpful.  I recommend contacting him if you need legal advice.

I reached out to this law firm multiple times via their website—both through email and the chat feature—seeking to inquire about retaining their services. Despite several attempts, over two weeks, I never received any response at all.

I understand that a firm may choose not to take on a particular case, and that's completely within their right. However, it's simply unprofessional and discourteous to ignore potential clients without any acknowledgment or reply. A brief message to say they’re not available or not taking the case would have been the respectful and appropriate thing to do.

First impressions matter, and being completely unresponsive leaves a poor one. I expected better communication from a professional legal office.

It was a pleasure working with Erik Feingold on my personal injury claim. He was very responsive to any questions I had and made the process as painless as possible. With his help I achieved a far better outcome than I expected.

I would highly recommend working with Erik!

We were referred by a friend to Sasha Collins to help us create a family trust.  The firm assigned Jason Knight and Michael White to work with us.  Jason was such a pleasure to work with.  Caring and knowledgable, he led us through the process in great detail, listened to our questions and concerns, and delivered a trust that we fully understand and that we are confident will guide our family in handling our estate when the need arises.

Michael White was fully involved throughout the process, setting up meetings, corresponding, paying great attention to every detail, notarizing, and finally presenting us with the documents beautifully printed and bound.

We will not ever hesitate to recommend Sasha Collins, Jason Knight, and Michael White for estate planning services and have no doubt that the rest of the firm will perform just as well if we are ever to need help with civil law.

My husband and I had a good pleasure of being able to work with Sasha Collins and her legal assistant Michael White. We were referred to this practice by close family friends who had their estate planning done with Sasha, and they could not speak highly of her enough. From the consult to the final signing, Sasha and Michael were exceptional in their work, communication, and thoroughly answering all our questions. We highly recommend seeing Sasha to anyone looking to have their estate planning done.

Erik Feingold was knowledgeable, experienced, and thorough in handling our personal injury lawsuit. He was patient, explained our choices and some intricacies of the legal system in a simple and understandable way; and he and his staff lifted all of the burden of the litigation process off our shoulders. He helped us reach a settlement award much above what the insurance company had offered, and as quick as the system allowed. I would give him 5 stars and recommend him highly for any of your legal needs.
Sincere and helpful. Definitely recommend for anyone seeking advice or representation.

Best experience.  Needed an attorney for an appeal of a case in Ventura County Superior Court.  My wife and I were recommended to use Erik Feingold, Esq. at Myers Widders by another attorney and friend of our family.  We spoke to Erik, who was down to earth in explaining how to proceed in the case, he made suggestions that worked out well, and we won the appeal.  I hope we don't ever need an attorney for this type of work again, but wouldn't hesitate to contact Erik at Myers, Widders.

I was referred to Sasha by a family friend to have my Trust & Will done . Sasha and her Assistant Michael were outstanding to work with . They made me feel comfortable throughout the whole process , answered my questions , and walked me through everything in great detail . I highly recommend the team at Myers Widders Gibson Jones & Feingold
Thank you Sasha and Michael for everything

I had the opportunity to consult with Sheri Valley regarding some legal questions I had. Even though we were not able to move forward, I was very impressed with the level of professionalism and knowledge displayed. Sheri took the time to thoroughly answer all my questions and provided valuable insights into my situation. I truly appreciated the help and guidance received during our consultation. If I ever need legal assistance in the future, I would definitely consider reaching out again. Highly recommend!

I had the pleasure of working with Sasha Collins on a recent probate case and I can't recommend her highly enough to anyone looking for an estate planning attorney or someone saddled with the burden of undergoing the probate process. Navigating the complexities of probate should never be done alone and one needs an expert by one's side.

Sasha was able to assist a mutual client with his late mother's probate case and she did so by guiding him through the process with compassion, professionalism, and patience, which makes a world of a difference when someone is still grieving the loss of a loved one. Sasha also provided timely updates so that the client never had to guess what steps in the probate process were next. Don't hesitate to give Sasha and her team a call for your estate planning needs. They are true super stars.

Hi Sasha,

We just want to thank you and your staff for all the work on our wills and trusts. You made it painless, fast and easy for us to do and that is saying a lot!
We are very happy to have it done. Wish you a happy Holiday season!

Regards,
Jack and Janne

I had the pleasure of working with Steven Lee and Doug Bordner at Myers, Widders, and I couldn't be more grateful for their expertise and dedication. They provided invaluable guidance on both an incentive agreement related to the sale of my company and an employment contract, addressing complex issues with clarity and thoroughness. Steven's help in particular saved me thousands in legal expenses when a dispute arose, as he added in red-line language during the drafting process that gave me leverage during later negotiations. I highly recommend Steven, Doug, and the entire Myers Widders team for anyone seeking business legal services in the Ventura area.
Monique was extremely helpful and provided answers to all of my questions.  Very appreciative of the time she took to speak with me about my legal concerns.

Finally did my estate planning after 6 years of home ownership (don’t wait that long). Sasha was incredibly kind, understanding, and walked us through the whole process. Since there were children involved from another marriage she did an excellent job explaining our options while making sure we felt comfortable with our decision. Her entire office team was responsive and kind as well. I have already shared with my friends, but I highly recommend Sasha Collins and her team for your estate planning needs!

I have had the most positive and profession legal assistance from Sasha Collins in regards to Estate planning. First for my parents who at the time were in failing health and in need of financial and legal advice in regards to their estate. All of which was extremely stressful and time sensitive. Sasha carefully advised and assisted us through several tough decisions that had a very positive outcome for our family. Additionally she has handled all of our personal estate planning for myself and extended family members as well.
I could not be more pleased with Sasha and the legal care that she has provided to myself and my family and I highly recommend her to friends and associates.

Sasha Collins helped me tremendously numerous times during personal and business-related situations that required far more than the advise/recommendations any loved one could provide. Whether dealing with probate or setting up a family trust, Sasha has walked me/ my clients through these processes every step of the way. I’m always impressed with how diligent she is with calling me and updating me on how we are doing and what we can expect, going forward. No surprises and no guessing. Sasha is the epitome of “integrity” and  I say that with sincerity, because nowadays, I feel we’ve lost some of that in our world. Sasha reminds me that it still lives and breathes in our local community, and she is what keeps it going. She has done wonders for my friends, clients, and family so if you are looking for a safe place to land, consider Sasha to do the same as she has done for me. I’m really happy with Sasha, and I trust you will be too. 🎤

Sasha Collins has been my  attorney for many  years. She is truly exceptional !!! Sasha is extremely knowledgeable in her field and also displays the highest degree of integrity.
I would not use anyone else and continue to recommend her to everyone I know.

I’ve had many transactions with different attorneys at this firm, and have always had great experiences with them. Sasha Collins in particular is my family’s personal attorney. She has always gone above and beyond the call of duty. From going to the hospital to have a member sign paperwork in an emergency to counseling my husband to ensure he understands the process with our Trust decisions. She takes the burden away from me with her calm demeanor,  and with something that can be stressful, makes it easy because Sasha is so knowledgeable and experienced. I would highly recommend this firm and Sasha Collins.
I need to update my trust. Sasha Collins and her legal assistant Michael White made the whole process effortless!  Thank  you!

I was so impressed.  I called regarding a worker rights issue and they took the time to answer my questions and place me with the most knowledgeable individuals.  They answered my complicated questions immediately.  (no waiting for a phone call).  I ended up ultimately not needing an attorney.  They could have charged for a consult but they didn't and provided me with help and resources.  I didn't need them today, but I would use them in the future and will recommend them to anyone that needs honest assistance.  Thank you Monique F!!!

Erik Feingold is the most knowledgeable, compassionate, and caring attorney i have been pleased to have assist me with my case. He provided valuable legal advice to my work related issue and i highly recommend his services to anyone needing an honorable lawyer. Sincerely, Rori Campbell

I was referred to Sasha Collins at this office by an attorney friend for help with probate on a small estate. We are almost at the end, and I am so grateful that I called her first. She is a calm guide, with experience that allows her to anticipate things that I never would have. Solid professional, huge help.

Mr. Feingold was incredibly helpful in a time sensitive matter. He quickly responded to me and answered all my questions. I really appreciated his patience because he covered each paragraph of my contract and answered all questions to ensure that I understood what that section was covering, what I was agreeing to, and accountability.

He is knowledgable, approachable, great communicator, and overall personable which made me really comfortable in a tense employment situation.

I appreciate all of his help and highly recommend him to anyone needing employment legal advice.

I cannot recommend this firm enough, especially Steven Lee! I was new to owning my business and Mr. Lee has always been there to help. We ran into a few employee issues starting out and everything was resolved smoothly so I can keep focusing on running the business. Thank you all for everything you do and I highly recommend Steven Lee for any employment law concerns!

Like a skilled surgeon for your legal woes, Erik Feingold slices through red tape with precision and finesse. With his expert hands, he can stitch together the complexities of your case, leaving no wound untended. Trustworthy, tenacious, and tactful, he is  the legal lifeline you need when life throws you a curveball. Don't just hire a lawyer; enlist a champion for justice. Your road to recovery starts here.

I had the privilege to work with Sasha Collins on my parents' trust. Her and her team were very kind, knowledgeable and professional.  She answered all my questions, and everything was handled in a timely matter.   I highly recommend Sasha and her team.

One thousand (1000) STARS for Sasha and her EXCEPTIONAL estate planning team. With seamless professional precision, like a graceful dance company, they orchestrated each component of our estate plan with comprehensive care, dignity and humanity along with humor, describing each detail in a language I could understand, process and digest. Rest assured you can RUN to this firm and they will take care of you 1000 percent! BRAVO!!!!

We had a litigation in a mold case when our two tenants filed a claim against us in
Ventura Superior Court of California.
Ms. Jill Friedman represented us.
During deposition stage of the discovery, the courts fined the plaintiffs to pay us a substantial amount of money.
After paying us the fine, the Plaintiffs dropped their case.
During the entire representation we felt that we were being represented by a very close family member.
The entire legal team treated us like family.
We felt so cared for and protected.
We highly recommend her firm for any litigation needs.
Arthur and Mary Jain

I feel very fortunate that I was referred to Michael Martin and his associates. I needed a real estate contract in a very short amount of time and they were able to see me immediately and efficiently create the necessary documents. I wouldn’t hesitate to refer this firm to friends and family.
Honest attorney no pressure at all.I felt so comfert sitting with him , he was listening to me all the way great man highly recomend him.
Jessica is a fantastic estate planning attorney! I highly recommend her.

Jessica is incredibly knowledgeable, a great communicator and has a very thoughtful approach to sensitive situations that involve complicated Trust matters.  She is simply wonderful and I cannot recommend her highly enough!!
Excellent attorney.  Have worked with her and she always has the best advice for clients.  Jessica is top notch!

It has been a great pleasure working with Ms J.Henderson. Her expertise in resolving any issues is outstanding. I’m most appreciative for her helpfulness. Recommendation for her legal counsel is personally set in my humble opinion at 100%!

If you’re looking for a competent, kind and creative attorney that goes the extra mile, Jessica is your go to. She is a great listener who understands the complexities of estate law and the desires of her clients.

I have known Jessica for over ten years. She is a thoughtful and hardworking attorney who does not hesitate to go the extra mile to provide each client with the personalized representation they deserve. The passion and commitment she brings to her estate planning practice and to her clients is truly inspiring. Donna M., Esq.

We reached out to Jessica Henderson for a recommendation and she went above and beyond to find an Attorney who met our needs. Jessica was very thorough and really took the time to listen and evaluate our situation to seek assistance from her fellow Attorneys. Thank you Jessica for all your help!
Robert and Sharlene Razo
Jessica is amazing. She is professional, friendly and her prices are great. I will send all of my will/trust referrals to her.

Jessica is knowledgeable and helpful. She anticipated our needs worked through all of our questions in a thorough and professional manner. As a real estate professional, I recommend her to all my clients.

So proud to get my family’s affairs in order with a living trust and finding J. Henderson Law to support me was the best decision. My family was walked through the process and it was so stress free. Jessica was patient, understanding and helpful in laying out the process step by step. This could feel very overwhelming, but with a guided expert the process was seamless.
Highly recommend.

I am an American who lives over in England.  I came to Jessica to seek help in putting together a California Will that would deal with that part of my estate that’s over here in California.  It was an unconventional legal task but Jessica approached the project with great professionalism and skill.  I found Jessica very understanding and friendly which made the whole process especially stress-free.  Her help and advice were exactly what I was looking for.   I very much look forward to working with J Henderson Law once again for any further needs.
Jessica handled our living trust, would highly recommend. Very professional, detailed, and explained everything so well.

When it came time for my husband and I to put together a trust, we had no idea where to start.  Jessica spent so much time with us explaining our options and helping us with all the details of what we wanted.  She didn't just slap together a boilerplate Trust and say "here you go!".  She custom-designed our Trust for our specific wants and needs.  If you need a great Trust Attorney, Jessica is your girl!

I had no idea how probate works, and Jessica had no problem explaining things and taking care of everything with no hassles.
Her advice and assistance is invaluable. Jessica is honest, to the point and professional with all her answers. THANK YOU!!!!

We have known Jessica for over 10 years. So when we needed to revisit our 20 year old  Will & Trust we contacted her. Jessica listened to what we wanted, gave us advice & provided us with written questions to answer before we met with her to discuss our changes. We found Jessica to be prompt, professional with a personnel touch and genuinely dedicated to our needs. Thank you Jessica for making our difficult decisions easier with your guidance & advice.

I just finished my Living Trust with Jessica. She made it Easy to understand and walked me through step by step. She was patient & caring. I changed my mind many times on certain things and I had many questions. Jessica was there at each turn making it efficient and effortless.
As a mom of two littles, getting my trust in order has been a high priority. My parents passed away at a very young age and nothing was in order. No Will or trust was established. So not only was it MESSY, most decisions were up to the Courts. It was important to me that my kids or family would never be left to the Mercy of the courts wether it be custody wise or financially. Now, thanks to Jessica Henderson, I have all my bases covered and that my kids will have a path I’ve chosen if anything were to happen. 10/10 would recommend.

Jessica made planning our family trust a breeze and walked us through every step of the design process with patience and professionalism. She was organized, quick to communicate, and extremely knowledgeable. She is a total pro and I would recommend her to anyone who needs estate planning.

Jessica was so helpful and professional. She answered all my questions (and I had a lot!) in a way that helped me understand what I need or would not need to complete my plan. It feels so nice to have my affairs in order. My family and friends will have no question as to what I want when I am gone. Just knowing they will not have have any issues where finances are concerned lets me rest easy at night. I cannot recommend Jessica enough!
I spoke with Mr. Doug Ridley and was satisfied with the conversation in regards to my case,  highly recommended
Great service provided. Excellent communication with staff. All questions answered. Better then expected outcome.

I couldn’t be more grateful for the exceptional services Tal Koyman provided through Ridley Defense. They recently represented me in a complex case and demonstrated incredible expertise and professionalism. They also went above and beyond to ensure a favorable outcome. Their attention to detail, dedication, and clear communication made all the difference. I wholeheartedly recommend Ridley Defense for anyone in need of top-notch legal representation.

"You have tons of support" & "I got your back" were TRULY meant by my attorney Reem Yassin. Reem successfully had my case dismissed (all charges dropped) & truly showcased her professionalism every step of the way! On dates of scheduled hearings she kept me updated, showed to court on my behalf, & all while I was able to be at work. Communication was always maintained and she was available wether it was a text or phone call away. The stress and emotional toll my legal situation had on me was nothing I could have ever imagined or been prepared to face alone. I felt at ease receiving her encouragement and trusted her 100%. I can assure you that you will not regret having her representation wether you are in Ventura County or surrounding areas. De corazón, muchísimas gracias Reem!

Im so impressed with the Ridley Defense Group, and especially my attorney Reem Yassin.  Reem was so easy to talk to and available whenever I needed her. Let me start by sharing just a little bit of my story. My girlfriend had a stroke three years ago and I’m a full-time caregiver. I got in the habit of having two or three glasses of wine every night just as a reward. So the afternoon of my DUI, January 4, 2025 Kathy had spent the week at her daughter‘s house and I went to the Burbank airport to pick her up. I got there early, so I stopped at a restaurant had something to eat and had two classes wine. I went to the airport, apparently I walked past a security guard Smelled alcohol on me. He went to the Burbank security guards at the airport and told them  that he smelled alcohol on me.  As I was putting Kathy in the car, they walked up to me and said “Can we talk to you”. Of course, I said sure. The story from there is they arrested me and I spent the night in jail! Completely humiliating on top of that I had to leave Kathy at the airport and somehow she got a ride home the next day I called my attorney friend Dan Spitzer, and he referred me to Tal. At a time of feeling guilty irresponsible and humiliated Tal was there to support me. The first thing that he did was to win my DMV hearing I got no restrictions to my drivers license. I did not have to put a blow device in my car and that was fantastic. Tal communicated with me all along the way, I knew nothing about this process. He gave me the greatest degree of self-confidence that it was gonna be OK!
Today we went to court and because of Tal‘s referral to Dr. Pilar and her letter that she wrote to the court I was granted a two year Military deferment Program that has multiple requirements by me, And alcohol treatment program, and quarterly check-in with the court. I’ve not been convicted and if I do the program correctly after two years, the chargers will be expunged from my record. I want to say again a big thanks to Tal for helping me through this really stressful time. I hope you’ll not drink and drive! If you do call Tal!

If you are seeking legal representation for a workers’ compensation or personal injury case, I strongly recommend contacting Deirdre Frank’s law firm. Their professionalism, expertise, and dedication to their clients set them apart in the field. The initial consultation comes at no cost, and from the moment you walk through their doors, you are treated with the respect and compassion you deserve.

In California, the standard attorney fee for workers’ compensation cases is 15% of the final settlement. While some specialized cases—such as extreme injuries or wrongful death—may require additional legal considerations, Deirdre Frank’s firm has successfully handled such complex cases, securing critical care and fair settlements for injured individuals and their families. Given that the base fee remains the same across firms, the choice is clear—why not work with the best?

For me, hiring Deirdre Frank’s law firm was a game-changer. Before securing their representation, I faced constant interference from my employer and insurance adjusters, dictating my medical care and limiting my options. After making the call to their office, all of that noise disappeared. I was finally able to focus on my recovery, knowing I had a trusted team advocating for me. That peace of mind was invaluable.

It is widely recognized that clients represented by experienced law firms receive better medical care, more thorough case management, and fairer settlements than those who try to navigate the process alone. The exceptional legal skill and compassionate approach of Deirdre Frank’s team make all the difference. If you or a loved one need workers’ compensation or personal injury representation, I urge you to make the call—you deserve the best.
Absolutely great attorneys and support staff. Always answer questions in a timely manner, and explain everything in very clear manner.
I highly suggest Mrs.frank to anyone who is trying to get things done. she's awesome. 🙏💯

She was knowledgeable, thorough and patient, explained the process in detail and kept me informed at every stage of the case. She worked hard to get me the best settlement possible and her legaI assistant Jeannette always helped keep the line of communication open. I would definitely recommend her.

I met with Ms Frank and that same day she took all the stress off my shoulders and carried it for me.  Then she got me a settlement that I was very very pleased with.  10 stars to this attorney!

Navigating a child custody matter is never easy, but Negley Law has made an incredibly overwhelming situation feel manageable and supported from start to finish. From day one, I felt confident knowing I had a team that truly understood the importance of my case and treated it with the seriousness and care it deserved.

I want to extend a special thank you to Chyanna Garee, who has been there for me every step of the way. Chyanna consistently provided clear guidance, steady reassurance, and exceptional dedication. She took the time to explain every option, answer every question, and make sure I always knew what to expect. Her professionalism and commitment made all the difference during a very stressful time.

This firm not only fought for the best interests of my daughter but also made sure I felt supported throughout the entire process. Their knowledge of family law and their genuine concern for their clients set them far above the rest.

To the entire firm and especially to Chyanna, thank you for your hard work, your compassion, and your unwavering dedication. I couldn’t have asked for better representation.

reviews.text:
I am a military veteran and a devoted parent with significant family caregiving responsibilities. I had an extremely disappointing experience with this firm, primarily due to their approach to communication and conflict resolution. Based on our correspondence, the child’s best interests did not appear to be the guiding principle. Sad.

What was presented as a “request” was delivered in an unnecessarily aggressive and threatening manner, including premature references to sanctions and custody consequences before basic information had even been shared. Rather than facilitating cooperation, the tone appeared designed to intimidate and escalate conflict. This approach does little to support or encourage healthy co-parenting.

There was a clear lack of transparency, with assertions made without supporting detail. When a co-parent asks reasonable follow-up questions or seeks clarification, that should not be reframed as noncooperation by a third party.

Most concerning was the absence of empathy or professionalism during a period of known personal hardship. Instead of exercising discretion, the firm chose escalation over communication. While that approach may increase conflict, it does not promote resolution, trust, or good-faith engagement.

Family law matters require care, accuracy, and restraint. Unfortunately, this firm’s conduct reflected none of those qualities in my experience. I would strongly encourage others to carefully consider whether an adversarial, pressure-first approach is truly in their best interest.

reviews.text:
It is hard to put into words the level of gratitude I have, for the incredible work John Negley has done for me and my family. After divorcing an abusive and narcissistic husband eight years ago, I endured years of relentless harassment. I had three different attorneys before John, and none of them could effectively put an end to the situation.

John Negley was a game-changer. From the moment he took on my case, everything changed. His communication was clear, direct, and incredibly effective. He didn’t waste any time—he took decisive action, and for the first time, my ex-husband finally backed down. The relief and peace of mind that John has provided me and my children are immeasurable.

One of the biggest challenges I faced was dealing with my ex’s attorney, who is extremely litigious and has a reputation for “running people out of money.” This attorney’s tactic of running up the bill forced me to back down the first time because I simply couldn’t afford to continue. But with John, that didn’t happen. His ability to cut through the noise and get straight to the point not only resolved my case quickly but also spared me from further financial and emotional strain. If I had John as my attorney from the beginning, I would have saved over $90,000.

Another thing that truly sets John apart is his commitment to protecting children. My ex-husband tried to manipulate my children into telling the courts they didn’t want to live with me, causing them extreme anxiety. John recognized what was happening and took immediate action to protect them, ultimately getting my ex-husband to drop the motion. Knowing that someone was looking out for my children’s best interests was a tremendous comfort.

If you need an attorney who will truly fight for you and your children, and deliver on what he promises, John Negley is the one to trust. He made a difference in our lives, and I am forever grateful.

reviews.text:
Mark, and the winning results he was instrumental in producing, were a true blessing during a very difficult period in my life.
I was at my wits end after unsuccessfully battling with my mother's long-term care insurance provider for additional benefits that she was otherwise eligible for and that my father had been paying premiums for 20 years.
Working with Mark over the course of several months revealed to me his in-depth professional experience, professional demeanor, wealth of knowledge, meticulous attention-to-detail, extensive thoroughness of documentation produced, commitment to ethics, concern for and focus on the client(s') best interest, fairness in billing, generosity with his time, exceptional, frequent, and beneficial oral and written communications; all resulting in an overall positive experience despite the uphill battle we were facing.
Mark remained positive and friendly throughout the entire process. I would say that he went above and beyond the call of duty. I will forever be grateful for his service and helping out my mom during her time of need.
Mark earned his 5-Gold Star and A+ ratings, again.
My money was well spent.
I highly recommend Mark Hancock without hesitation!
reviews.ownerResponse: Dear Erick, it was a pleasure helping You and Your Mother. As one who started his career representing insurance companies, I find it much more righteous and fulfilling representing deserving Insureds. I love it when Justice prevails!

reviews.text:
Mark Hancock is the best hands down!
I had the most positive experience with Mark Hancock as my attorney. When I found Mr. Hancock, I was at my wits end trying to find an attorney that could help me with my situation. He swooped in took control of the situation and always validated my concerns. Communication was amazing, I was never left wondering what was next for he always seemed to be one step ahead. I can't say enough good things about my experience and I definitely slept better at night knowing he was handling my case. I highly recommend Mark Hancock, and would have him help me again without any hesitation.

reviews.text: I am very satisfied with the help I received from Mr. Hancock, Esq. in an important liability release matter. He not only was very timely with return calls and written responses. He was very thorough and knowledgeable in providing the exact assistance I was seeking. Thank you very much for the peace your legal guidance provided.

I had a very positive, and ultimately rewarding experience with Mark Hancock.  At all times he was professional, informative and always patiently explaining the legality of my case. Mark was forthright  and honest  when offering his opinions about what the outcome could possibly be and in the end I was able to make my decision to pursue the case based on knowledge and not emotions.  I would highly recommend Mark Hancock.

We are very happy with Mark Hancock’s counsel and advice.  During my husband's appeal process, he was very prompt in returning calls, emails, and answering  questions.  He wrote an extremely detailed and excellent appeal.  He was very thorough in obtaining and reviewing our records, concentrating on the significant complaints and developing information about them, obtaining  medication lists and exploring the side effects. He worked very hard with my husband's many doctors to have forms and reports completed by them, which proved to be most helpful.  He explained and convinced us of the importance of getting a vocational opinion and the importance of applying for social security disability benefits.  I believe all of these things proved to be most useful in getting my husband's appeal granted.  If a need ever arises, we will not hesitate to call on Mr. Hancock again

My husband was referred to Mark Hancock by another attorney friend a couple of years ago to help us in a case against an insurance company.

Immediately Mark took control of the situation.  He contacted the insurance company and started proceedings against them for wrongful termination of the longstanding disability case.

He was able to get all of the records which proved that the company was dishonest in their dealings with my husband.

Long story short, we were able to go to arbitration and obtain a suitable settlement.  We now can live our lives in a much better place than before when we were being cheated out of our insurance money.

I highly recommend Mark, and have in the past sent friends to him for his assistance.
Sincerely,

Sandy C

Our experience was wonderful, the communication was perfect, they really care about giving you a good outcome.
100% recommended!

I HAD A TRULY EXCELLENT EXPERIENCE WITH NPN LAW FIRM! THEIR COMMUNICATION WAS OUTSTANDING KEEPING ME INFORMED EVERY STEP OF THE WAY. If you want competent, experienced, professional attorneys who treat you with respect and kindness, this isn’t the firm for you. Awful experience w/attorney Melinda Castro and her assistant Luisa Medina. Melinda agreed to take on my lawsuit against my property management company. We’d emailed and talked on the phone. She was very clear on what my case was about. I signed the retainer agreement. For a week her assistant Luisa was “not available” or “on a call” and Melinda was “in trial and unavailable.” I had an upcoming court date and wanted to make sure Melinda was going to be able to file the document in time. Finally, on a Friday evening Luisa sent a letter signed by Melinda terminating our agreement. We hadn’t spoken, there had been no communication, no conflict, nothing. To have me in limbo all week thinking I had representation, only to terminate our agreement on Friday evening, is despicable. I lost days of valuable time I could’ve been using to retain another attorney. And it’s the way she ended the agreement. Having Luisa send the email, “Please see the attached” with no explanation, no policies, nothing, is despicable. Melinda is inexperienced, but there’s no excuse to treat people this way. I strongly advise against working with this law firm.
Great experience always had me updated and never once did I have to call for an update! Thank you Devin for all your wonderful help!

I hired Mr. Jarrod Wilfert for a DUI with injury case. This case was over two years old and even though I originally was told, I passed the sobriety test and did not get a DUI for some reason they decided to bring it back. Keep in mind, I had made several complaints about the police department, ignoring restraining order and allowing me to be abused. I had all the evidence to show not only was I assaulted that same month which is why I tested positive for a medication. They didn’t decide to bring the charge back because I got an evading police charge because I have PTSD Which had already been communicated with the police department many times. I did not evade the police. I let the car roll forward while having a panic attack. I tried to make that case for the police Evasion case Which should’ve been allowed because I really did have a mental health diagnose That I had been treated for four I had proof that I dealt with Negligence from the police and I put in reports. Nobody cared they wouldn’t let me make those arguments and they let me get a conviction which made them review the dui Decide to charge me. I had proof that I was assaulted that same month that I put in a complaint to the police department because the police who responded was friends with my ex who was my abuser. I also had proof that my car was rear-ended just a couple weeks before, and I took it into a mechanic who said that if it continued to Have break problems To bring it in, I had text messages with the owner of the car telling him that I thought I needed to bring it back in. I was on my way to the mechanic when the accident happened. I passed a sobriety test, and my roommate was with me when I passed it But for some reason, two years later during court They changed it And it said I did not pass. These were all viable arguments I could’ve brought in front of a jury But was advised not to because Mr. Wilfert told me he believed I could get it reduced to a misdemeanor, And from what I understand that would’ve this dismissed The whole case. While going through all this, I had to watch my abusive ex get hate crime And then get them dismiss due to mental health problems. Which he only saw because he was court ordered too, But as a woman who deals with a real medical condition and pays out-of-pocket for my my treatments Wasn’t the same treatment within my own community because apparently I’m a bad woman who needs to take a accountability. Besides all this There was several mistakes made with my case. For some reason, the police were very eager to have me go into the jails, So I was requesting house arrest, especially because of Covid. Mr. Wilford receptionist told me she was sending in the paperwork, right away. But after contacting the sheriffs department, I found out the paperwork was never turned in, I had to fill out the paperwork myself And turn it in last minute. If I didn’t persistently I would’ve had to go into the jails at one of the most dangerous times during Covid. Months later, I had texted Mr. Wilford because he told me to text him anytime, I texted him four times in one month Because the judge told me if I did everything within months, He would reduce the charge to a misdemeanor And get me off probation. So I was excited and I was texting him trying to get information on meeting up to discuss this. He never responded and you see me get concerned as if I thought something happened to him. Instead of getting a professional response and being allowed to be informed on my case and get help, I had the receptionist contact me getting… FULL REVIEW IN PHOTOS

It is a misrepresentation that Mr. Wilfert states that he will fight for you, and is knowledgeable because he used to be police officer and a DA himself,  because he lets the court decide and have control of your case, thus your destiny.
I had to start calling Mr. Wilfert's office and demand that he would communicate and tells anything about our case.

If your case is serious and you are looking for an attorney that is going to fight for you, and present a good defense,  communicate with you about your case, do yourself a favor, and do not hire Wilfert Law.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Dear Ms. Castillo,

I am sorry you are feeling so frustrated. I care very much about my clients including your son.

I think anytime we have loved ones, especially our children, who get caught up in the criminal justice system the entire process can be overwhelming.

In the juvenile justice system, we do not enjoy the same procedural safeguards present in the adult court and in fact, it is the Judge relying on information provided by Defense Counsel, the Prosecutor and Probation who determines what he or she believes is in the best interest of the minor. This is true even when the Judge's opinion is not what the parents desire. I can understand how frustrating this can be.

I had been asking my secretaries to have you come in to talk to me directly and I know they have been reaching out to you for some time now.

Why don't you give us a call and come sit down with me face to face? I would be happy to clear some time and walk you through the discovery and listen to your questions and hopefully answer them to the best of my ability.

I know this situation has been stressful for you, I'd like to try and make it better.

Dealing with a DUI in Ventura can be an overwhelming sensation, especially when it comes to choosing legal representation.  Looking at the letters in my mailbox was like looking at a box of crayons, with seemingly limitless options and no idea where to start.  Then, at the suggestion of a close family member, I decided to take the plunge with Wilfert Law, and never have I felt so confident and satisfied with a decision this important.

Jarrod, Marlene, Ros, and everyone else on the team have been some of the most pleasant people I have ever had the pleasure of knowing, and have somehow turned this experience into one that I will look back on positively.  Their expertise and professionalism come at no cost to their friendliness and caring attitudes.  Being completely new to legal matters, I never felt as though I was coming off as a liability to them, and they have helped me learn so much about how to deal with these situations.

It is rare to find exactly what you're looking for in the first place that you look.  However, if you're looking for a representative and don't know where to go, there is no better place to start than Wilfert Law, and I don't see myself going anywhere else.

Had multiple ads sent in the mail to me after my 1st (and only) DUI. By far the Wilfert Law package stood out. Extremely professional, seemed almost too good to be true. Never any issues getting updates or trying to contact them. I never had to show up for court. Always kept me up to speed and let me know what steps I needed to take in order to get the whole situation handled. They fought hard to try and bring my charges down to wet and reckless due to my levels being 0.082. But being Ventura county it just doesn't happen. But he was able to make it so I did not have to serve any jail time. Biggest help is that they were able to get me completely off of probation after 12 months instead of me serving the 18 that I was sentenced. Last rung on this ladder is to get it expunged from my record which Jarrod and his team are already planning out. Bottom line is, if you need a lawyer, this is the place to go. You won't have a better experience with anyone else.
Jarrod is very professional,  He takes pride at what he does. Best Lawyer in Ventura county

reviews.text:
I highly recommend Craig Murphy to anyone who has been in a car accident, especially if your family was involved. Our accident unfortunately happened on my teenage daughter’s birthday, which made the experience even more traumatic for her and our family. From the beginning, Craig treated our situation with care, patience, and professionalism.

He helped both my daughter and me find a great chiropractor who supported us throughout the entire recovery process and helped ease a lot of the pain we were dealing with. Craig was always quick to respond to our questions, took the time to explain every step of the process, and made sure we understood what was happening with our case. He was thoughtful in his approach—always listening first and providing clear guidance when we needed it.

What really stood out was how much he went above and beyond for our family. When the insurance company was giving us a hard time and delaying things like getting a rental car, Craig stepped in and made sure it was handled quickly so we didn’t have to keep dealing with the stress. That level of support made a huge difference during a difficult time.

Because of Craig, my family was able to focus on healing instead of constantly worrying about insurance problems and paperwork. He truly helped us get back on track. I’m very grateful for everything he did for us and would recommend him to anyone dealing with the aftermath of an accident.
reviews.ownerResponse:
George:
Thank you for your very kind words and appreciation. Fortunately, most people have never been injured in a car crash and have had to experience first hand the tactics used by insurance companies and adjusters. Often it is one road block after another all in an attempt to get you to go away or just give up. I am glad that we are able to stand up for people against the insurance companies that are motivated by one thing and one thing only; company profits. They do not want to take responsibility for the injuries caused by their insured's negligence and they try to make it as hard and as frustrating as possible as a means of wearing people down. Over many years of experience, we have developed a proven track records of standing up for people against these giant insurance companies and their unfair tactics. I am glad that we were able to help you and your family out.
Craig Murphy

reviews.text: WORST LAWYER IN TOWN, RUDE AND WILL WASTE YOUR TIME!!!
reviews.ownerResponse:
I have a law office where we pride ourselves on delivering outstanding client service and getting exceptional results for our clients. Up until this time, we had all 5 star reviews. If we were to receive a negative review we would take it very seriously and determine what needed to be fixed so that the problem that led to the negative review did not happen again. That is not the case with this review. This person is not a client of our firm and we never rendered any legal services to him. Instead, I responded to an advertisement he ran for web services. I requested that he make changes to the firm website. He provided a price quote and told us that he only accepted Venmo for payment. As a result, I informed him that I needed to set up a business Venmo account. He performed no work on my website and provided no services. He merely responded to two texts and two emails. Although I told him that I was waiting for my Venmo account to be set up, he provided this negative review without even asking me the status or following up.
I was not rude to this man and I did not waste his time. However, I can state that I will not be using his services.
My point for stating this is that we take legitimate reviews very seriously. Our goal is to provide our clients with the very best professional services. Unfortunately, I chose the wrong vendor to ask to perform services on my website. I will be more selective in the future. I also suggest that anyone reading this review and response who needs to hire a personal injury attorney also make sure that they hire the right attorney for your case. Call me and talk to me, you will be glad that you did. You will get personal attention, and we will treat you with dignity and respect, something that seems to often be missing these days.

reviews.text: If you need a personal injury lawyer look no further. You would be doing yourself a disservice if you do not hire Mr Murphy. I have nothing but great things to say about Craig and his staff. We were dealing with an adjuster that would not communicate with us for nothing and Craig handled this perfectly and was able to get my case resolved as quick as it could have. I want to say thank you to Craig and his staff for a wonderful experience.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Brandon:
Thank you. Unfortunately, often times dealing with insurance adjusters is very difficult. It is what they are trained to do! Thank you for working so closely with us on your claim. As a result, we were able to get your claim resolved. I am also glad that the settlement will allow you to move so that you can get on with your life after this crash and your injuries. We wish you the best of success.

It is our goal to do what we can to help our clients. Every person is unique and we treat each of you as we would like to be treated if we were in your situation. We know that it can be very frustrating when the insurance adjuster takes a ridiculous position. However, that is why we stand up for our clients in these situations. If we did not, the insurance companies and their adjusters would steamroll innocent people who have been injured in car wrecks through no fault of their own. The insurance companies only concern is money and profits. Our concern is to make a difference in our clients' lives. We know that you appreciate that.

Thank you once again.

Craig Murphy

I was looking for a lawyer to defend me in a lawsuit. I scrolled through google and found Murphy and Murphy Law.  I called and Craig immediately answered. He was kind and thoughtful.
