reviews.ownerResponse:
Spencer & Scott:
Thank you for this kind review. I realize that most people have never had to hire a lawyer, so it is uncharted territory for them. Not every attorney is right for the needs of every client. That is particularly true in the area of personal injury law, which is what I do. Many lawyers who never handle personal injury cases take personal injury cases hoping that they can make some quick money. Unfortunately for the client, the inexperienced attorney messes up their claim and often a skilled and experienced attorney like me has to come in a clean up the mess. When someone needs legal representation, it is not a time for a lawyer to do "on the job training." Also, when someone like you has never had to hire an attorney before, it is very difficult for you to know who is a good attorney and who is not. Therefore, even when I get a call from someone with a case that is not in my area of expertise, I talk with you and try to get you to a skilled and experienced attorney who will be able to help you resolve your legal issue. I am glad that I was able to do that for you.
Craig Murphy

reviews.text: I can't say enough good things about Craig Murphy.  You don't run across attorneys like this very often! My son was involved in a very scary accident and Craig was so knowledgeable, kind and caring.  He was very quick to call us back and answer all of our questions.  I don't know what we would have done without him and his office.  I highly recommend Craig!
reviews.ownerResponse:
Kelly:
Thank you so much for your kindness. Most people have never been though the trauma of a serious car crash and the aftermath. The insurance companies are not there to help. They want to make the process as difficult as possible so that they can get you to go away or they can avoid having to pay for your injuries and damages. It is very frustrating. The insurance companies seem to set up roadblocks and give you countless hoops to jump through. Once you have done it, they deny your claim.
As you know, we try our best to talk with you and answer your questions and address your concerns. While these things are new to you, we have dealt with these issues on a regular basis for many years. We want to be here for our clients so that you can concentrate your efforts on getting better and getting your life back to normal after a serious car crash. I am glad to hear that we were able to do that for you.

reviews.text: Craig Murphy and his firm did an excellent job handling a family member's insurance claim. They were professional, timely and informative. I would highly recommend their firm.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Eric:
Thank you for your confidence in us. I am glad that we were able to get a favorable result. As you found out, even when it appears that there is clear liability, many insurance companies will challenge liability and try to place responsibility on the injured person. When we prove the insurance company wrong, the insurance companies then challenge the injuries and damages. Once that is proven and we obtain the policy limits, the policy limits are often insufficient to compensate the injured person for all of their injuries and damages. We therefore have to engage in extensive negotiations to reduce the healthcare liens so that the injured person obtains compensation.
Thank you for your cooperation and assistance throughout this process. Also, thank you for taking the time in giving us this review. It is greatly appreciated.
Craig Murphy

reviews.text: My daughter was in a car accident in January 2020. She was a passenger and another car going the opposite way crashed into them. Paramedics came and took her to the ER. At first he seemed like a  "go getter" but, as time went on he would let his assistant handle their phone calls and he never knew what was happening with the case. My daughter got a check from Craig Murphy  in May 2021. I know cases drag on under normal circumstances, but this was all during COVID.  The other two are still waiting to hear from their lawyer. Craig Murphy has been wonderful and returned all our calls and was happy to let us know if their were updates or not. Wonderful service.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Cheryl.   I am glad that we were able to help and keep this matter moving forward for you during COVID. reviews.text: Craig Murphy and his firm handled my wife Kathy's personal injury case. reviews.ownerResponse:
Mike:
It was a pleasure and honor to represent your wife in her case. As you know, retail stores deny liability and fight these claims to the bitter end, even when their liability is very clear. Retail stores, their insurance companies and their corporate insurance lawyers take the same position time after time: "Deny, Delay, and Defend." It is only through perseverance, planning and hard work that we are able to get fair settlements as we did for your wife and you.
Thank you for placing your confidence and trust in us. It was a pleasure and honor to be able to represent you.
Craig Murphy

reviews.text: Craig Murphy handled my personal injury case. My  accident happened in Nevada but I reside in California. He was very responsive and informative throughout the entire process. reviews.ownerResponse:
Alina:
Thank you for saying these nice things about us. Also, thank you for letting us represent you. As you know, despite what seemed to be a very clear case, the insurance company fought us to the bitter end. Your willingness to stick with us through thick and thin really made a big difference and allowed us to get your case resolved. It is hard to believe that despite the clear facts, the insurance company demanded to take your deposition, sent us written question after question, and had you examined by the insurance company's doctor. Even after the doctor selected by the insurance company confirmed your injuries, the insurance company still fought us. By preparing your case, being ready, willing and able to take your case to trail, the insurance company finally put up the white flag and paid the full and fair settlement.
Thank you.
Craig Murphy

What really stands out is her integrity and attention to detail. Estate planning can feel overwhelming, but Laurie made it simple and gave us complete peace of mind knowing our family is protected.

If you’re looking for an attorney who is knowledgeable, trustworthy, and genuinely invested in her clients, I highly recommend Laurie Peters. Whether it’s estate planning, family law, or general legal guidance — she’s someone you want in your corner.

The courts sound a little bit disorganized right now with all the closures and shuffling of personnel, but Blaine made sure my TRO request was pushed through. It still stinks that the person couldn't be asked to move out as part of the TRO, but this is a big step in the right direction.

Before I called the Law Offices of Laurie Peters, I was  a stay-at-home mom trying to navigate a divorce on my own. When disagreements between my ex-spouse and myself arose, his attorney began to pursue me aggressively. I desperately needed an expert to work on my behalf.

I contacted numerous law offices and asked around for recommended attorneys. A trusted friend referred me to Laurie Peters. When I met Laurie, I felt immediate relief. She was empathetic, knowledgeable, and full of sound advice. She helped put me at ease.

Laurie herself advocated on my case and set matters straight. In the end, my ex fired his attorney and we collaborated to form a mutual agreement with the aid of Laurie's staff. With their guidance, my ex and I were able to come to a fair agreement in the best interest of the children and the whole family.

I am very grateful to Laurie Peters for helping me get through my divorce, and I highly recommend her services. Five stars all the way.

Laurie Peters is an excellent attorney, her dedication and common-sense approach to family law issues gets you the results you deserve. Attorney Peters is a zealous advocate, always prepared and on top of her game to fight for her clients. She is a powerhouse! She assured me she would stick by my side and help. They all did, the team at Laurie Peters Law Offices. You will not find a more talented, dedicated, ethical, smart or empathetic attorney!

reviews.text:
If you're searching for an accident attorney, stop looking at other options--This is the law firm you want to work with.

My wife got into a bad car accident (multi-car accident caused by a drunk driver). 48 hours after the accident, I called two of my friends in the area and asked for a referral and they gave glowing recommendations for this firm. We had never been in a bad accident before, much less hired an attorney before, so I wasn’t sure what to expect. We spoke with David on the phone, and we were very reassured by David’s calm and reassuring demeanor and instantly had the impression that we were in good hands. He has the heart of a teacher, and explained everything at a pace that we could understand. The team is very responsive to phone calls and emails and we were kept in the loop constantly with all major developments with our settlement.

David was extremely proactive, and did a lot of calling on our behalf to everyone ranging from the tow truck company, various doctors, insurance companies, you name it. David also advised us early on places where we could save money (for example, he helped us release our totaled car to the junk yard much earlier than we otherwise would have, and we saved hundreds if not thousands of dollars in storage fees from that alone). We tend to be too “nice,” and find negotiating over money to be very stressful. We were so thankful that we had this team in our corner having these hard conversations so that we could take the time to heal after the accident.

When I was involved in a motor vehicle accident I had no idea what to do. All I knew was that I was in pain and couldn’t afford treatment. A family member referred me to this law firm after his motor vehicle accident and told me I could trust them. Immediately they told me everything was going to be okay and took action to help me find treatment for my injuries. They explained everything to me very thoroughly throughout my case and answered any questions I had. They fought hard for me and I will always remember their kindness.
Dave and the whole team are great to work with and very responsive! Highly recommend.

David Richard handled my case with all honesty and transparency. He was available to answer all my questions promptly. He said/she said car accident cases with significant injuries can be tricky, but he got me the full settlement payout through the insurance company. He even refunded some of his fees because the company settled just before it went to court. In a world where trust is hard to come by, I trust David Richard to work hard and do the right thing.

David & Nichole handled my case with Care. They were trustworthy, professional and made me feel like they cared about me as much as the case. Truly appreciate you and your team. If you’re looking for a great advocate they are a great group of professionals!

Richard Bartlett lawyers were an incredible team to work with. They took my stress and made ut their own, went to work on my case and I did not have to handle a single thing but answer any questions they had. I could not be more impressed and I don’t take time to review anything or anyone. They won the highest settlement they could have possible gotten got me. Grateful there are good honest people out there willing to be fair and work on such a tragic traumatic car accident lawsuit. Thank you so very much

Excellent legal team! Dave Richard and Nicole are professional, knowledgeable, and truly care about their clients. They always respond swiftly and keep you informed every step of the way. Highly recommend this Ventura law firm for trusted, reliable legal support.

Always so professional and helpful no matter the situation. Dave Richards is one of the top Lawyers in the personal injury sector and adding Nicole only upgraded this law firm. I would highly recommend using them to take care of your family.

I can't recommend Nichole and her team highly enough. She’s not only a sharp and deeply knowledgeable attorney, but also a compassionate and committed advocate. Her involvement with organizations like CASA, combined with her professional accolades and proven track record, speaks volumes about both her legal expertise and her heart for service.

She brings professionalism, integrity, and genuine care to every case—especially for clients navigating the stress and uncertainty that can follow an injury. You can trust that you’re in the best possible hands.

The only law firm I trust in Ventura County and the greater Los Angeles Area. Dave and Nichole are extremely trustworthy, professional and communicative with case updates. If you or your family have had a wrongful death or personal injury, these are the lawyers I'd call first.

I was looking for someone "local" rather that a worlds largest law firm type and I am glad I went with Richard & Bartlett. If you are looking for someone to hold your hand and call to update you every week, this may not be the firm for you. But if you want someone to get you the best results, give them a call. We gave them the necessary information, not sure how much of a case we had, after 14 months of trying to get somewhere with the insurance company. Then 10 months later went in to the office to pick up a check! The girls in the office are great. David handled our claim. Thank you all.
Referred many cases to this firm with great results. Highly recommended!
they were very thorough and understanding! i really appreciated their patience as things continued on with my situation and i am very happy with their services!

I hired Richard/Bartlett Lawyers to assist me with a difficult personal injury case-boy, am I glad that I did.  Nichole worked with me tirelessly.  She guided and prepared me excellently throughout the ordeal, to a very good outcome.   She was very patient and very kind, and I recommend this firm very strongly.

David was amazing and Chelsea and Nicole make his firm even greater 🙌 what a blessing they all were during my case. I would highly recommend anyone who has a bodily injury case to them! They are very professional 👏 👌 and HONEST!

Richard Bartlett Lawyers are truly one of kind.  Each and every one of the members on their team operate with professionalism, integrity, transparency, and compassion - three things that are difficult (but not impossible) to find in the field today.  David and Team foster an environment in which you’re able to focus on and prioritize recovery while leaning on a trustworthy and competent team to take care of all the heavy lifting and engagement with insurance companies, medical providers, etc.  Because of these business practices alone, they are always the team I have chosen when needed and also who I recommend when asked.

Richard Bartlett Lawyers truly exceeded all my expectations! From the moment I walked through their doors, I felt a sense of relief and reassurance.

Dave demonstrated an unparalleled level of professionalism, kindness, and attentiveness that immediately put me at ease during what was undoubtedly a challenging time.

Dave, along with the entire team at Richard Bartlett Lawyers, went above and beyond to ensure that both my mom and I received the care and support we needed throughout every step of our medical journey. Their dedication to our well-being was clear from the start, and they navigated the complexities of our case with expertise and efficiency.

Not only did they handle our legal matters with precision, but they also took the time to truly understand our unique circumstances, ensuring that our needs were met with compassion and understanding. Their commitment to securing a fair settlement for us was unwavering, and I am incredibly grateful for their tireless efforts on our behalf.

Without a doubt, I would have been lost without the guidance and support of the Richard Bartlett Lawyers team. Their exceptional service and genuine care made all the difference, and I wholeheartedly recommend them to anyone in need of outstanding injury lawyers.

Thank you, Dave, Nichole, Lauren, and everyone at Richard Bartlett Lawyers, for your dedication, expertise, and unwavering support. You truly are a beacon of excellence in the legal field, and I am forever grateful for everything you have done for my family and I.

Highly recommend Richard Bartlett
He, and his team are very undestanding, and humble. They really focus on understanding the payment you’re going through, and fight to get what you deserve. He treats all clients with respect. I will always recommend him to my family, and friends. Thanks 🙏 David

David and team exceeded our expectations on all levels. My sister was in a terrible accident with the other party who was at fault denying responsibility and putting the blame on her. I was looking to help her find a good lawyer. David was highly recommended to us. I wasn’t sure what to expect but I can honestly say that David and team was Godsend. Everything you would want in a Lawyer. Kind, professional, genuine, and knowledgeable, great at what they do and trustworthy. He was also very patient with all our questions as well as in explaining everything to our satisfaction.
After our first meeting with him we walked out of his office with both my sister and myself feeling she was in great  hands.

I believe the time it took to dispute injustice will have its FAIR return because as a result, the $25k policy limit was achieved plus an additional cost for property damage. Did you know the $10k I received in the mail today is not earned income, but is compensation for injuries, which means I do NOT have to pay taxes on this amount, and I do NOT have to report this to the IRS?

Why can't politicians be this straightforward? Anyway, case-dismissed thanks to a lot of hard work and a bit of luck on our part, and I didn't even have to show up. I'm grateful for his services, and will gladly return should I be in need of representation in California again.

What truly set him apart is his knowledge of the DA’s office and his dedication and strategic approach, which ultimately led to my misdemeanor case being dismissed before trial. Throughout the process, he remained calm, supportive, and focused always available to answer my questions, no matter how big or small.

If you’re looking for a lawyer who not only fights for you but also genuinely cares about your well-being, Ron Bamieh is the one to call. I am beyond grateful for his help and would not hesitate to recommend him to anyone in need of legal representation.

reviews.text:
An Exceptional Advocate – Attorney Casey White is Truly One of a Kind

I cannot say enough positive things about Attorney Casey White. From the very beginning, he demonstrated an extraordinary level of professionalism, integrity, and compassion that immediately put me at ease. Casey doesn’t just practice law—he lives it with purpose and passion.

He took the time to truly understand my situation, made sure I felt heard, and explained every step of the process with patience and clarity. He was always available to answer questions, never made me feel rushed, and treated me with the utmost respect throughout our entire time working together.

What truly impressed me was Casey’s unwavering dedication. He fought for me like I was family—strategically, skillfully, and with unmatched determination. His knowledge of the law is second to none, but it’s his ability to combine that expertise with empathy and genuine care that makes him stand out.

Thanks to Casey White, I not only received a favorable outcome, but I also walked away feeling empowered and supported. If you’re looking for an attorney who is both brilliant and truly compassionate, I wholeheartedly recommend Casey White. He is, without a doubt, one of the best in the field.

reviews.ownerResponse:
Rachel:

We are sorry to read your perceptions about your experience. We are uncertain about your identity and would never be able to speak in a public forum about confidential client matters in any case. Unfortunately, this prevents us from understanding and addressing your specific experience. If you would like to discuss your experience personally and confidentially, we would welcome your phone call.

As every attorney will tell you, no attorney can promise a favorable outcome from the court. What we do promise is to tell our client’s story in the most compelling manner, and advise clients carefully on their risks and opportunities at every step along the way.

We thank you for your input and invite you to call us for a more complete conversation that, of course, cannot be held in a public forum.

Very truly yours,

Justin Alvarez

reviews.text: One of the best. This is my second experience receiving legal help from the Jaffrey Law Group, and once again, Iman represented me with a perfect blend of professionalism and genuine kindness—qualities I’ve rarely encountered at this level. His skill in understanding and building a case is truly exceptional; he leaves no detail overlooked and consistently crafts a strategy that puts me in the best possible position. In the courtroom, he’s calm, persuasive, understands what the judge is asking, and is highly respected, advocating for my case with clarity and strength, relying on good old-fashioned facts and evidence. But what truly sets him apart is his empathy—he listens, understands my concerns, and is there to guide me through every step. I couldn’t imagine a better lawyer, and I’m beyond grateful to have had him by my side once again.

Due to this attorney’s poor organization, lousy management, and general inability to remember both client information and conversations with his clients, I’ve lost not only thousands of dollars, I’ve lost time with my aging parent, time that I’ll never get back.
I hired Iman in hopes of helping me with a dispute over seeing a family member, and what should of been a simple court appearance, his lack of ability to manage the case he kept dragging the case along, pushing back the court dates, due his “other case” which seemed to always be a problem for him to manage (this is an online court appearance, shouldn’t of taken more than an hour of his time).
Each time we talked I had to restate the facts to him over and over, as if he wasn’t able to remember basic details or concentrate on information I sent to him via phone/text/email.
Of course, the urgency of being able to see my family member as they have declining health has made me desperate to move the case along, only to have Iman over and over push the court date due his “other case”. He claimed to talk to the other attorney in the dispute, but offered no viable outcome outside of court proceedings.
In the end after wasting thousands of dollars and him demanding more, it became clear he’s just trying to make as much money as possible, taking advantage of my eagerness to resolve the case as well as my limited time due to being in the middle of a complex move.
Don’t bother wasting your time with this attorney if you need results and don’t like your pocketbook ransacked with his extreme levels of ignorance and incompetence to manage his schedules

Iman Jaffrey represented me in a serious court case. He worked diligently for almost four years to earn me my life and career back in the face of serious allegations. Iman above all else is a kind and caring man. He spent hours on the phone with me while I was scared and stressed and would lay out what was happening clearly and concisely. For almost half a decade Iman stood by me, always answering my calls and texts. Never saying he was too busy. I could not recommend this man more if you are in a legal situation. If you are honest and messed up or simply made a mistake and want to be a better person, Iman will fight for you like no other lawyer I have ever seen. (truth be told, hes the only lawyer ive ever had to hire BUT for almost 4 years I was in court and watched other lawyers who seemed to care more about the prosecutors opinion than their defendants needs) Iman will fight for you. Hes a family man and a kind soul. If your reading this Iman, Im doing great and I think about all you did for me often.

-Dalton

reviews.text: I hired Mindy McQueen back in 2015 for a DUI in Thousand Oaks, and she did an excellent job then. Fast forward 11 years — I contacted her out of the blue needing a copy of the officer's sworn statement (DS-367) from that case for an alcohol evaluation for an older out of state dui DMV hearing to renew my Ca. license. She not only remembered the case but emailed the document to me the same day — at no charge and with no questions asked. That kind of integrity and willingness to help a former client years later is rare. She's knowledgeable, compassionate, and goes the extra mile. If you're facing a DUI in Ventura County or need help with old records, she's the attorney to call. 5 stars!"

I can’t say enough about how much I appreciate Mindy. She is the most efficient, professional and most importantly EFFECTIVE attorney I have ever worked with. Mindy worked her magic for me and satisfied my case within days of contacting her. I have never forgotten how quickly she helped me, and what a pleasure it was to work with. I highly recommend Mindy for anything to do with the DMV.
The minute we spoke to Mindy we knew she was highly skilled and compassionate!  She has years of experience and definitely a FIGHTER!!

Mindy Mcqueen is an awesome defense lawyer.  When I received my letter from DA from Ventura, I called three different law firms to represent me for my BUI. She was the most personable.  She answered the phone even though it was Friday after 5 pm.  The other lawyers had call centers and message machines.  That showed me her dedication towards her clients and that she would work hard for them.  She was able to get me Judicial diversion for my case something I have never heard of.   Instead of the 1st DUI that the DA was recommending. I highly recommend Mindy Mcqueen.

Mindy McQueen was recommended to Me by a close friend, Who lived  a  similar situation.I contacted her and from the very first conversation we had I noticed her knowledge, professionalism along with the passion she put to her Work. My  situation was complicated and She was able to navigate it and fight for me  when everything  was against me , even she was working on my case on her vacations , been on a  different continent .Because her knowledge,Sharpness,passion and professionalism I was able to get an OUTSTANDING  result ... NO SUSPENSION  on my Driver License  so she WON  my refusal to  the DMV , she WON the  hearing to the DMV   and my DUI was reduced to WET RECKLESS I was lucky to have Her on my Side. Thank You Mindy.

Mindy McQueen is an incredible attorney who is very supportive, responsive and sharp. She’s extremely passionate and fights hard for her clients as if they’re her own family. She helped me get a tricky legal situation dismissed and I am very grateful to her commitment to seeking justice on my behalf. She gets it done, plain and simple. Highly recommend.

WILL YA shut the front door?!  Mindy is a STAR lawyer - I was facing a 2nd DUI, being close to .08 BAC.  It would have probably been a wet wreckless and some other exorbitant penalties and fines but I just owe the court $150!  She was able to get me a judicial diversion so now I'm just doing some community service and a few things, but damn I'm so lucky didn't get any points on my driving record.  I'd have her represent me anytime, but hopefully this is the last!

I did my research and talked to a few attorneys, but when I spoke to Mindy I got the sense that she knows the system inside and out, and I'm glad I got some comic relief from her, my hairs were starting to turn white from stressing out.  Thanks, Mindy McQueen!

Mindy McQueen is absolutely amazing. She was able to get a stay on my license and kept me driving up until my court day- which was almost 3 months after my arrest, as well as no jail time despite what the DA recommended. She helps make a very traumatic situation easy to navigate through and is always there to answer any questions. I highly recommend Mindy if you want to beat your case. She is the best!

Mindy McQueen is an absolute powerhouse in the courtroom. She took on a very old and serious case of mine — something that could have easily gone sideways — and turned it completely around. Her deep knowledge of the law, razor-sharp strategy, and calm confidence were exactly what I needed. On top of that, she was incredibly compassionate and responsive throughout the entire process. I never felt like just another case — she truly cared. I would hire her again in a heartbeat, and I wouldn’t trust anyone else with something this important.

Mindy is an amazing lawyer and person. I was completely distraught when I was charged with my DUI and couldn’t figure out what to do. One phone call later I knew I made the best possible choice imaginable for my situation.
Mindy gave me such piece of mind and ensured I knew the process and how she could help me navigate the Ventura County Legal System. Thanks to her, I was entered into the Vet Court system which led to no conviction, no fines and fees, and most importantly no jail time. I would recommend Mindy to any and everyone I know if this situation happened to them. 5/5 is to low of a score!

reviews.text: Donna Santo Mehas is a very professional lawyer, along with a very professional staff.  I was searching for a lawyer familiar with Military law, and Donna was the top of the search!!  I needed a divorce attorney and she has amazing military knowledge.  She kept me up-to-date on everything and if I did not understand something she was very patient and explained the situation in detail, until I completely understood the situation.  When it came down to spousal support, a lump sum was not satisfactory and Donna "fought" for me until I was awarded a lump sum and full monthly spousal support (we did not have children) and now I am able to live comfortably without worrying if I am going to make ends meet.  If you need a professional lawyer, whether or not you need Military law, consider Donna Santo Mehas, you will definitely NOT be disappointed!!
Santos Mehas law firm is knowledgeable, courteous and responsive.  I would highly recommend them to others.

When I brought in this law firm to represent me in my divorce, my wife and her lawyer knew I had gained the ability to fight back if necessary. From that point on, negotiations could proceed. Peace through strength. Fortunately, no protracted or unnecessary fighting was necessary. Due to longstanding relationships, understandings, and trust between my team and my wife's team, deals were worked out on several fronts, avoiding crossing anyone's red lines and resulting in a final settlement in a reasonable amount of time at a price far below what either of us expected to pay.

I need assistance ASAP! I called many firms & I was turned away due to COVID & the emergency of my case. I contacted Dona & Michael & they were there so fast, helped me prep, told me what to expect, what they needed from me & explained the processes. I highly recommend there services but be prepared to go to battle because Donna & Michael will literally go into that battle & win it. I have had great experiences with them as a professional team & know when I need them they are there to help , guide & support. It’s like a family & they wanna make sure your family is well taken care of. I appreciate them so much. Thank you.

Criticism #2 The business does a ton of outreach to build the business and my hat is off to them for the hard work they put into that outreach, but there are many Spanish speakers in our community who are home owners and have assets worth protecting. I’m impressed with her skills and would recommend her to anyone who needs legal support in family matters.

Lauren doesn't get caught up in the drama that the other party or their attorney will attempt to drum up. She sees the facts and can advise you while still letting you make the final decision on what direction you want to go.
My husband and I are VERY happy with the way she has represented him. We were so happy the 1st time, we hired her again when he needed representation in regards to bogus support allegations.

Went to get a consultation from Janette for child support. She answered all my questions and then some. Provided paperwork I needed, broke down necessary answers I needed to put on my paperwork and pointed me in the right direction to get my case moving in a timely manner. She’s very professional and kind and will lead you in the right direction. I highly recommend her for your family law needs.

I came to Janette 2 years ago. I was in a toxic and volatile marriage and needed an attorney. Janette supported me throughout my entire Temporary Restraining Order hearings and child custody hearings. Twice I made the decision to try and work it out and drop the TROs Janette never judged me, always offered the very best advice in moving forward and when I finally made the decision to not waiver in my decision to leave for good and move all the way through with a permanent RO she was there to hold my hand and give me the confidence and assurance that I could do it and my truth would prevail. I won my hearing for a permanent RO and I received 100% sole and legal custody of my kiddos. I also hired her as my divorce lawyer. She’s not just a lawyer she’s my friend for life. She knows her way around a courtroom, she is not intimidated, and she makes you feel validated. I recommend her to everyone

I had a very frustrating experience with Attorney Janette Magdalena's office. After agreeing in early July 2024 to help reunite me with my children and adjust my income statement due to a disability from a car accident, I paid the full fee upfront and provided all necessary documents.

Unfortunately, when I finally had a status update meeting on October 17th—after it was delayed multiple times—it became clear that no work had been done on my case. The entire hour was spent discussing elementary steps rather than any real progress. When I inquired about billable hours, I learned that there had been zero work completed. It’s incredibly disappointing to have hired someone for a straightforward task and realize that no action has been taken after months of waiting.

Communication was poor, and my concerns felt dismissed. This lack of progress and transparency is not what I expected when hiring an attorney. I strongly advise others to be cautious when considering this law office, as my experience has been nothing short of negligence.

Sincerely,

Distraught Dad

PS You are a liar, you didn't let me go, I fired you when I found out you had done nothing after months. You didn't need to strategize anything. I asked for an income adjustment and to write a letter to the judge stating she isn't participating in court ordered therapy.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Mr. Collins.
I am sorry you feel that way. However, I completely disagree with your assessment of what happened.

When I cancelled the contract we had for my services, I told you I had done many hours of work on your case, but had NOT billed you for them.

Because of the facts and prior orders in your case I was working hard to try to come up with the best way to get you the results you wanted. I never promised any results.

In my opinion, your case was not straightforward and required a great deal strategy. That is what I was working on, as I did relay to you.

I ceased our relationship because I did not want to continue to work for you. You got me confused with another attorney multiple times and routinely accused me of conspiring with her attorney because of my admiration for her attorney. I would never do that. I barely know her attorney and did not even speak to her about the case.

You left this review after I refused to as you put it "assure protection" against a "one star review" and to "readjust" our "agreement more be in your favor". Essentially, I did not let you blackmail me into giving you your retainer amount plus interest. Which I had essentially done by not billing you for the hours of work I did.

You were even rude to my staff when you picked up your file.

I hope things work out for you.

reviews.text: I came out on top after a very intense custody battle. It's been such a relief knowing that Janette and her staff have my back. Her conference room and office are just across the street from the courthouse, and are a sanctuary during stressful times. What matters most, I've found, when looking for representation, is integrity. I have zero doubt in my mind about Janette's prowess and more importantly, her compassion and wanting to do right by her clients. 10/10!

Janette says she’s cost efficient or her work is “discounted” to make clients believe they’re getting a deal but in reality you’ll be paying more in the long run. It takes her twice the time to draft a boilerplate documentation when a seasoned attorney, who charges a higher hourly rate, would overall cost less. Janette will say she is being thorough but it’s called inexperience.

I thought anyone could handle my parentage case because it literally required no litigation and it only needed to be in writing. I was wrong. Janette received my case in February. A month later, I initiated contact because I had not heard from her and I wanted a temporary agreement in writing for Easter. After my initiation, great, she agreed to meet with me. After our meeting she tells me she’ll draft it up and get it to me asap for review. Easter passes and I still hadn’t received a draft to review. In June, I initiate contact again and I ask to review the draft of judgment. She then sends me said draft. The draft did not include some of the items I wanted and it also included items that weren’t necessary. Fine, I send my edits back to her. I don’t hear anything in return. Next thing I know, I’m billed 2.5 hours for edits! Edits! Keep in mind she initially charged 1.5 hours to draft the judgment. My edits were minor and simply add, remove. And I never received a copy of the edits; no work product provided for those 2.5 hour edits. When I raised my concern for the outrageous billing, she claimed it takes her 5-6 hours to draft a judgment. Inquiring with other local family law attorneys, it should take maybe 3 hours for drafting a judgment and that includes some back and forth to fine tune language between counsel. She never even made contact with the opposing counsel in my case. She tried to tell me that my prior attorney took most of the retainer. After calculations, she took more than my prior attorney and did less. Money down the drain.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Giselle,
I am sorry you were unhappy with our service. I did take over your case from your prior attorney. The transition between the two offices took a little longer than anticipated. I was very thorough in the preparation of your documents. It does take me a little more than most attorneys, due to my thoroughness. I try to anticipate all issues and make sure there are no issues in the interpretation of the documents. I did not bill you just for edits. The documents were carefully done. I have about 20 years of experience (16 as a family law paralegal) preparing documents. You were provided with the final draft. I also refunded some of your money in good faith. Again I am sorry you are unhappy. Sometimes our jobs seem easy to the lay person. Some times things may seem easy to a non lawyer but they are not as "simple" as it seems. That is why people hire lawyers.

reviews.text: Janette is amazing!  I HIGHLY recommend her.  She is honest, upfront on what to expect and always there for you. If we ever need an attorney again, we would call her in a heartbeat!

Divorce is stressful and if you don't know the law, you need someone to represent you that doesn't make you feel like you just another number or income coming in.  Janette is someone who shows she cares and is willing to do all legally possible to ensure fairness in the law.  I highly recommend her if you are searching for a family law attorney.

reviews.ownerResponse:
Michelle, I am sorry you feel that way.
Although I do not know who you are nor have I ever represented you. I do care about your concerns. I am very cost effective with my client's retainers and with the services I actual bill to my clients.
I also do not make any promises about an outcome of any case. As I cannot guarantee what will happen.
I zealously advocate for my clients and work super hard to get the best results possible.
I have had very few clients who have been unhappy with my representation. With these clients, I believe they were more bothered by the result not my representation. I cannot change the facts of a case nor can I force a client to act in a manner that will help them best or to not sabotage their case.

I will continue to work hard for my clients and I will take your comments into consideration.

Communications with clients, or prospective clients, is of the utmost importance at our law firm. My current husband found Randy for me as I was not in the state of mind to deal with a debt my late husband had accrued under one of my credit cards before he decided to take his own life 6 years ago.  By this time the debt had been sent to an attorney's office for collection and was over 10 years old. Apparently, the company had put a lien on my house and everything! Not knowing what to expect or what was going to happen with a debt that started out over $20,000.00 I went in to see Randy for a free consult.  Randy was incredibly sensitive to my situation and immediately made me feel as ease with his expertise in debt resolution.  Within that first consult I knew Randy was the man for us.  Sure enough within a short period of time Randy was able to negotiate the debt down to under $2000.00 and was able to get the lien off my house.  I can not even tell you the relief and appreciate I feel for Randy and his staff for taking care of this for me and my family.  What he did for us was priceless.  I highly recommend Randy of Rounds & Sutter LLP
These guys really care.

I remember a time when I was on top of the world. Everything I touch turned to gold, any idea I had I knew would be successful. Those were the days I thought I was untouchable, and quite honestly I was. I had found success, financial security and was living the life I always wanted. I was providing for my kids making my family proud did not have a care in the world. Then in an instant everything changed, I went from being on top of the world to falling hard, hitting the ground with a very large splat! I like many, had been caught up in the real estate bubble and when things burst all over the nation, they burst big in my home as well. I thought I was done for; I had no hope, and no understanding of how I could make things better. With some stroke of luck I reached out and called my attorney (Tamara Harper, who also had become a friend of mine), and I explained that I was upside down in life and needed some help. She referred me to two individuals who are now not only my attorneys but also dear friend, John Rounds, and Randy Sutter of Rounds in Sutter ... John and Randy made an appointment with me the day that I called them.  Without getting to specific about my troubles….I am here to tell you that John and Randy gave me reason to breathe again.  With their strong support and extensive legal knowledge, they provided me a path to a new life.  John and Randy were then and will always be my ROCK.  They always have my best interest at heart and keep my legal matters in perfect order. I recommend to anyone who needs help with their life to see Rounds and Sutter.  They are the BEST!!!

I was very lucky to have found the Law Offices of Rounds & Sutter. John, Randy, and their staff were always kind, efficient and expedient. reviews.text: Good lawyer, very smart.

When I first came to Whelch Law , I was facing an extremely serious case with the possibility of significant prison time. The stakes were incredibly high, and I knew the outcome would impact not only my future but my family’s as well.

From the very beginning, Chris took the time to explain exactly how serious the situation was and what I was realistically facing. Through his strategy, persistence, and dedication, he was able to defeat major charges and help me avoid what could have been a life sentence, ultimately resolving the case with time served, which is truly a win.

Lisa was an essential part of the process. She was consistently responsive, made sure communication never fell through the cracks, and helped keep things moving whenever Chris was tied up. Her professionalism and calm, reassuring approach made a stressful situation much easier to manage. Together, Lisa and Chris work seamlessly as a team.

Chris never gave up on my case, and because of his hard work and commitment, our family is able to move forward, stay together, and put this chapter behind us without having to look back. I would confidently recommend this firm to anyone facing high-stakes criminal charges who needs experienced, dedicated, and reliable representation.
Excellent lawyers, I won a case with them! Highly recommended. Communication was always excellent and they were very professional. They have excellent customer service and always told me the truth.

Best Attorney in the county. He Got me out of jail while I was being held in Nevada for a case in Ventura county. I was facing 4 felony charges and was sentenced to 2 years of probation. No jail time, no community service, no classes. He went the extra step with everything and the whole team was good with communicating with me if he was handling another client. Definitely recommend!

I called Christopher Welch an hour before a court hearing for an incarcerated family member after their original attorney was unable to make it. Even on such short notice, he was there in the courtroom less than a hour later! He was super friendly, informative, and confident. He extended the hearing to the following week and was able to gather information needed, the judge posted bail and is soon to be out! He is very knowledgeable and is an amazing attorney, I would highly recommend him to anyone!

Where to start … Mr Welch is the best lawyer too do it … He really takes pride in what he does he isn’t money hungry very friendly an out spoken . Mr Welch encouraged us to take it trial a reassured us that he would do his best an he new he could best this case . My husband was facing 40 years an we did take it to trial an all 12 jurors said not guilty . My husband was charged with a very serious Felony it was a process but Welch was worth every penny we spent to have him pick up where our last lawyer we fired at . We appreciate your support and help Mr Welch your the best hands down couldn’t have done it with out you .. if your ever in trouble an need a lawyer don’t walk run an hire Welch he is very reasonable with pricing you won’t regret it 🤍
reviews.ownerResponse: So greatly appreciate the kind words and appreciation. Thank God for the intelligent thoughtful strong jury we were given. Definitely humble when a jury sees things our way in such a heavy case. So glad to help give you and Rommie a second chance at life together.

reviews.text: Chris is quite literally the best lawyer you could ever hire. From the very beginning it felt like he genuinely cared and was committed to helping us get the best possible outcome for a very serious situation. He was patient, honest, knowledgeable, and present. He never sugar coated anything but assured us he was fighting for us and explained all the possible outcomes (multiple times I might add) both good or bad.  It never felt like we were just a case to him and the only word that we could use to explain what it felt like to have him represent us in front of the judge is safe.  Lisa is also amazing! She was always quick to text or call back if Chris was busy and is a breath of fresh air with her smile and positivity. Together they are an amazing team. Chris was able to help us walk away from what could have been a life sentence with just some time served, which is a win. He never gave up and because of his dedication and hard work our family will be together and be able to walk away from this and never have to look back.

I have never wanted to hire a attorney until recently when my son was being charged with crimes he didn’t commit. I heard good recommendations about Mr. Welch. I reached out to set up a meeting to talk and meet with him and let him know my situation with my son. Talking to him it made me feel like I wasn’t talking to attorney I was talking to a person who truly genuinely cared. The determination he had to make sure my son wasn’t charged with the crimes he didn’t commit was a plus. He fought for him for months making  it a priority. It was nice to have someone on our side to help us fight. We weren’t alone and he spoke for us which was another plus. I would definitely recommend Mr. Welch to help you fight
reviews.ownerResponse: Nicole I am so pleased I was able to defeat such serious allegations for your son. All of the other boys were convicted, and went to prison, or the juvenile equivalent. I know how stressful this was for you, and I am so pleased we were able to get the charges dismissed on the verge of trial.

reviews.text: Great attorney. Recommend.

Hello, my name is Tim.

I normally don’t write reviews, but after my recent
experience with Mr. Welch, I felt it was necessary.

Mr. Welch was actually my second attorney. I originally hired an attorney out of Calabasas, although he was communicative and respectful, he was not experienced in gun law. His honest opinion was he could not guarantee that I would not end up being a felon & was suggesting that I might plead guilty to get a lesser charge, which is really scary to somebody who’s has never been arrested or convicted in his life.

I started researching attorneys that were familiar in gun law. There was one attorney that was recommended by multiple people and multiple attorneys in the Ventura county, which was Mr. Welch.

Upon meeting Mr. Welch and explaining the situation I was in, he was very understanding and also very upset that an honest, hard-working citizen would end up being in my position. He assured me that he would do everything in his power to make sure I did not step foot in a jail.

Mr. Welch is highly knowledgeable and skilled when it comes to gun law and to be quite honest, I don’t think I would’ve had the same outcome had l stayed with the first attorney. During our preliminary examination Mr. Welch did an amazing job, his attention to detail, his vast knowledge on the mechanicals of weapons and his extensive research landed a modern day miracle, & my case was dismissed.

Through the whole process, he was very supportive and very communicative. He always got back to me in a timely fashion either with a phone call or email. To give you my honest opinion, I would highly recommend Mr. Welch. My family and I thank you for everything that you did for us. I can’t express the amount of gratitude that I have for you and your firm.

Through the whole process Mr. Welch believed that I was innocent & asserted me that everything was going to be okay. There was one thing that stood out to me, after the case was dismissed, Mr. Welch demonstrated an act of humility in my opinion, instead of being overconfident and cocky his reply was (God is good.) me being a man of faith i definitely agree with that statement!

From the bottom of my heart, thank you for everything, Mr. Welch!!!!!
reviews.ownerResponse: Very grateful for coming through for you with the result you deserved. The Da and detective fought hard for a felony for someone  who bought their rifle legally and took all reasonable steps to comply with Ca’s ever changing gun grabbing laws. You deserved this win Tim, and yes God is Good… he almost always gets it right!

reviews.text: If I could leave a 100 star review I would. I had a felony on my record from 10 years prior and was recently charged with possession of a firearm after an illegal search. I had already payed for another lawyer and was told that if I was lucky I would be doing only a couple of years, at this point I had already lost all hope. After a few months of no progress, I made the decision to change lawyers, after meeting with Chris something told me that this is the lawyer I needed. I decided to put my trust in him instead, and he took over from that day forward. Having him fight for my case was the best decision I’ve ever made, he was passionate, confident, and strong in court. He instantly got me off of probation. I would have been grateful with being offered a plea deal of little to no jail time, instead he was able to get all charges dropped for me. I am immensely grateful to Chris and Lisa for all they did, the dedication they had to fighting my case was as if they were fighting for their own loved one. My family and myself are forever indebted to them. We can finally move on from this nightmare and I can lay peacefully in bed knowing I am a free man thanks to Chris. I will be praying for their continued success and will never forget all they did for me and my family. Thank you always.

reviews.text:
I’m canceling my hiring of him. This is what I wrote to find a new attorney.

Do you take cases where another attorney has already been to court and got 2 answers from the judge to drop the case . I told him that day 8 days before I reached him that I wouldn’t accept the offer. He hasn’t responded until I sent many emails to his secretary telling me how busy and good he is.

Contacting him is full of excuses from his secretary. I don’t care about money. I want someone who cares about the client.  I want to offer the judge something more applicable, not based on how little he knew.

He is in your building, but, I don’t care. Please let me know if you are that person.

Jeff
——————
Progress? He showed me his cards. His business model, applied, is about $1.8/yr. Speed and fixed pricing are the drivers. Most judges are reasonable and will drop charges if we do certain things.

I was looking at a felony charge with jail time along with probation. I also had three pending cases that would include jail and probation as well. Due to my prior records I would not have stood a chance.

He was late to every court appearance, he was unprepared, unmotivated and he pushed my case several times due to his lack of knowledge regarding my case. He was very hard to reach by phone, he did not return most of my calls and getting him to request the documents that I neeed was always met with excuses.
With his continued lack of concern as to how this case would greatly affect my life and after many failed attempts to get him to fight on my behalf, we decided to obtain Christopher P. Welch Criminal Defense Lawyer.
Chris proved to be all that he said he would be and much more.
He never made promises he could not keep nor did he promise us an unrealistic outcome. Thou to be quite honest he moved mountains and helped create miricles. We were absolutely shocked and amazed at the outcome Chris created for me.
He always responded 24/7, handled every situation promptly and professionally.
Chris not only got my felony charge dropped to a misdemeanor with no jail time, he also worked diligently to get me approved into the EMU program which is extremely hard to get into with limited space. I was not only thankful to be a part of this program, but my experience during that course was life changing for me in many ways and has brought such a positive outcome for me. Chris also worked his magic with my three other pending cases. He got two of my cases dropped and I took one plea with no jail time on my third case.
It was an honor to have Chris in my corner! I honestly don't know where my life would be at this point if it were not for his services, his care and compassion.
I owe it to him for my recovery and the great things in my life today.
Chris Welch is most definitely an amazing lawyer that gets results, he truly cares about his clients.

reviews.text:
I hired Mr. Seigenfeld (Rick) as I had a time sensitive matter involving a post divorce judgment QDRO, that had yet to be resolved over the previous 5 years, since the divorce judgement.

What should have been a simple matter to resolve, quickly became a very complicated and frustrating situation.

Coming into this situation after a 30 year law enforcement career, as well as  this situation's previous divorce proceedings, I can confidently state that I am writing this review objectively after having years of professional and personal experience with many attorneys in the criminal, family law and civil arenas.

From my initial consultation through the end of the process, Rick and his staff were extremely helpful, and VERY patient during what was a very frustrating situation for me.

From a personal perspective, when ever I had a question or didn't understand something, Rick, himself was always very accessible to answer my questions or ease my frustrations in a personable way.  As were all of his staff.

From a professional perspective, I couldn't have asked for more. Rick is extremely knowledgeable when it comes to his areas of practice. More importantly, If there is a unique situation he has not previously experienced, or is not expertly versed in, rest assured he will advise you of such and seek out more information from an expert in said area before moving on. This aspect gave me great confidence in Rick, as this is what a knowledgeable, professional does!  What he won't do is BS you and pretend to know something he doesn't, in order to hastily triage your matter and keep it moving down the conveyer belt of cases as so many do.

Also under the heading of "Professionalism", Rick is very level headed and strategically focused on the "long game" of his client's individual situations.  Unlike many, he is not going take your money then immediately portray himself as your personal attack dog for hire, telling you what you want to hear, while parroting your personal distain for the opposition without objectively looking out for your best interests.  Trust me, you don't need a subjective "best friend" in a situation like this, you need a knowledgeable, objective strategist that has your best long term interests in mind.  This was exactly who Rick was in handling my matter.

Lastly, from a business perspective, Seige Law could not have been anymore professional.  All fees were reasonable and clearly explained up front, all documents were professionally drafted and expeditiously filed, and billing statements were sent out each and every month, clearly stating all charges and balances.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your business and the positive review. It was a pleasure assisting you.

reviews.text:
The Best Attorney!!!

I can’t thank Atty Taylor enough for her incredible support throughout my injury claim process. From the very beginning, she was not only professional but also genuinely caring. What stood out the most was how easy it was to reach her whenever I had a question, and she always made me feel like a priority. Her dedication and hard work made a stressful situation much easier to navigate, and I’m beyond grateful for all her help!

I would like to express my sincere gratitude to Taylor for her exceptional work in handling my injury case. As this was my first experience with such an issue, I was initially quite stressed and uncertain about the process. However, Taylor's patience, guidance, and unwavering support throughout the journey made all the difference.

Taylor's professionalism and attention to detail were evident from the outset. She thoroughly explained the legal complexities involved and kept me abreast of every development. Her ability to anticipate potential challenges and provide proactive solutions instilled confidence in me that my case was in capable hands.

Thanks to Taylor's tireless efforts and strategic approach, my case was ultimately resolved with a favorable outcome. Her ability to negotiate effectively and advocate relentlessly on my behalf was truly impressive. I am grateful for her unwavering persistence and determination to secure a just resolution.

Beyond her legal expertise, Taylor displayed genuine empathy and compassion throughout the process. She understood the emotional toll that my injury had taken on me and was always available to lend an ear and provide encouragement. Her kindness and understanding made this challenging time more manageable.

I am truly fortunate to have had Taylor as my legal representative. Her dedication, skill, and unwavering support were invaluable in achieving a successful outcome. I highly recommend Taylor to anyone seeking an exceptional attorney to handle their injury case

Working with Taylor for an injury I sustained in a car accident was an absolutely incredible experience. She was so professional, kind, and (most impressive) so quick to respond to all my questions or queries. Taylor went above and BEYOND to ensure that I not only got the most amount of compensation I could receive, but invested so much time/energy to work with me and a doctor to ensure I was recovering in the process of evaluating my injury.

If you're on the fence (which I typically am with law offices), don't be. Just jump on a consultation call and you'll quickly see the level of transparency, professionalism, and urgency in which Taylor will look to assist you if it is necessary.

I have her business card saved on my phone and will be calling her if i'm ever in an accident again.

I cannot thank Emerson Law enough for their incredible support for my daughter’s boyfriend after his accident. Their attention to detail and dedication to his case were truly remarkable. Their professionalism, combined with a genuine commitment to achieving the best possible outcome, went above and beyond our expectations. Thank you, Emerson Law, for an amazing job! I will confidently be referring your services to everyone I know.

I am writing to offer my highest recommendation for Taylor Emerson, the principal attorney at Emerson Law in Ventura, CA. Mrs. Emerson represented a close family member of mine in a personal injury case, and I can say without reservation that she is an outstanding attorney, demonstrating exceptional skill, professionalism, and an unwavering commitment to her clients.

From the start, it was clear that Mrs. Emerson approached the case with the utmost dedication. She treated the matter with a level of thoroughness and attention to detail that is rare in the legal field. She took great pride in her work and made sure that every aspect of the case was handled meticulously, leaving no stone unturned.

What truly distinguishes Mrs. Emerson is her relentless determination and her refusal to back down, no matter the opposition. Despite facing significant challenges from large corporations and powerful law firms, she remained resolute in her efforts. Her determination, unwavering focus, and approach reminded me of the character portrayed by Julia Roberts in Erin Brockovich, where an individual stands firm against enormous odds in pursuit of justice. Mrs. Emerson demonstrated this same level of perseverance and commitment, consistently fighting on behalf of her client with integrity and principles at the forefront.

In an industry where many may be driven by financial considerations, Mrs. Emerson practices law with a deep sense of morality and devotion. Her passion for achieving justice for her clients is evident in every aspect of her work, and it has been refreshing to see such a strong moral compass guiding her practice.

I rarely provide recommendations, but I can confidently say that Mrs. Emerson is one of the finest attorneys I have had the privilege of observing. If you or someone you know requires a capable, diligent, and principled personal injury attorney, I strongly recommend making Taylor Emerson your first and only call. You'll be thanking me in the end!

Sincerely,
Michael M

I am writing to highly recommend Taylor Emerson for anyone in need of a dedicated, thorough, and passionate attorney. Taylor represented me in a car accident case, and I could not have asked for better legal support. From the very beginning, Taylor was incredibly thorough and detail-oriented. She took the time to explain every aspect of my case and ensured I fully understood the legal process. Her level of care and attention to detail made me feel confident and at ease throughout the entire journey.

What stood out the most was Taylor’s relentless determination. When the person involved in the accident lied and the insurance company became uncooperative, Taylor stood her ground and never gave up. She fought tirelessly on my behalf, treating me not just as a client but as if I was a member of her own family. Her compassion, combined with her professionalism, made me feel supported every step of the way.

Despite the numerous ups and downs, Taylor was victorious in the end, securing a larger than expected settlement check for me. Many attorneys would have thrown in the towel, but not Taylor, she was determined to win, and she did!!

If you need an attorney who will go above and beyond for you, I highly recommend Taylor Emerson. Her dedication, professionalism, and compassion make her stand out, and I am forever grateful for the work she did on my behalf!

Exceptionally talented group with a wealth of experience and knowledge in business law. Grateful to have Jon Light and his team for our business.  Highly recommend!
I would definitely recommend. They are very prompt and knowledgeable and helped with a quick resolution.

Jon Light helped our case recently.  I just don’t know how I can express appreciation and how graceful we were for his help. He is a lawyer with heart.  He was always considerate not to waste his time / our money.  He was quick and I felt no time was wasted.  He informed us and asked what we wanted and gave us advice if we could not decide what to do.

The first lawyer we consulted with, referred by an acquittance, told us it would cost us $100k for his legal fee alone.  This would not include the settlement or the cost of the opposing parties attorney which we were likely to have to pay. He made us very nervous and we didn't feel right about him.  Nothing was done and we didn't hear from him for about 2-3 weeks. (There are 2 email correspondences between him and Ms. MF (Plaintiff's attorney) who said her charge was $925 per hour also didn't feel right.

We were charged $3,625- for consulting with the first lawyer which included the three 30 minute phone conversations between him and my husband after we decided to leave him and move to Jon. One of the conversations was with he and his partner telling my husband how good they were with this kind of litigation and we should not leave them, etc.  We build for two attorney at $625 per hour rate. I successfully got the charge of $937.50 back for these 3 phone conversations.

My point is that we made the right decision leaving the first lawyer and came to Jon Light.  We were very fortunate that someone referred him to us, that the person also went through the PAGA litigation with Jon’s assistance in the past.  The sense of security with Jon helped us to reduce our stress level to go through this lawsuit for 9 months.  We knew we could trust him from our gut and we are very glad we did.  I just can't say enough good things about Jon Light.
Bad exprerience.

Beware of this company. They will charge by the minute for everything including emails, texts, calls, etc. It will add up quickly! You’d be better served going with a fixed price attorney or law firm.

It's really important to have a solid employment attorney to have you by your side -- and I highly recommend Jonathan and his legal firm Light Gabler.

I was very impressed with Iva when I first worked with her a few years ago when she assisted me with my divorce. She was always reasonable and fair to both sides and never tried to create an unnecessary  "war" between us.  For these reasons, I chose her again when I needed legal assistance for a recent custody issue involving my husband's young daughter.  Her mother was refusing to negotiate and disagreed
to our original, very minimal, custody change request asking for alternating Saturday overnight visits to be added. This forced us to file a modified custody request to obtain the visitation that we believed was 100% legally justified. Per Iva's legal advice, we also included ALL of the visitation we wanted to be added.  Iva remained focused on the law and always advised how the law applies on each side.  She offered solid legal advice for us to chose from.  She had no interest in trying to escalate the disagreement in order to keep us arguing.  This is a huge plus because it was very emotional.  After mediation, the mediator's custody recommendation included just about everything that we requested in our filed custody modification. Opposing counsel completely disagreed and was still unwilling to negotiate.  It was set to go before the judge after lunch.  During lunch, we were called back because the opposing side was now ready to come to an agreement.  This new custody agreement included far more visitation than what we were originally seeking in the
very beginning before having to get the court involved!  Iva's assistance during the process was key !

This was an empowering experience. I came to Iva having zero confidence and truly no idea of what I needed to do. He would keep us heavily involved in every aspect of our case and goes above and beyond to make you feel comfortable and confident with his services. Yes, I would HIGHLY recommend Wells Law if you are in a similar situation of needing someone to represent you in an accident case. Prices were ridiculous over charge and they try to scared me and  husband state ting he would get put in jail and that are only way out would be them . They had 5  different people trying to convince us and give a high deposit or pay it all at once to take our money. We walk out of there without any hope. We had one more appointment pending with one more lawyer who was Scott and wow was I impress made us feel so comfortable he is super friendly and kind speaks some spanish he also offered us payment plans and he literally 3 min away from Ventura superior court. Right away we new he was the one. My husband walked in there with his 3th dui and driving under a suspended license and he was still paying his 2nd dui with revoked probation and more. To make it short my husband started fixing his relationship with alchol and started a treatment and program and Scott Bentley was able to demonstrate that my husband had taken action in his recovery and convince the judge to reduce his jail time. What was are surprised ?That Scott convinced the judge and was able to take my husband sober living program and treatment and gave him credit for it . So there for all chargers were dropped.  We were shook something big had happened. God heard our prayers and sent us here with Scott at the right place.  I'm forever grateful 🙏 🥲. I 💯 will recommend him. He did so much for my family.  Thank you for everything ❤️ he was our family light in the midst of darkness.   Please don't get fool with false advertisements do your research and for my spanish speakers only no se dejen enganar por esas radios que promocionan puro raters es pura promocion hagan bien sus envigastiones pidan ayuda esaa radios Latinas son bien mentirosos y les meten miedo si ay esperanza solo que nesecitas encontra un buen abogado de confianza poreso yo les recomiendo a Scott Bentley tambien habla español no mucho pero lo sufficiente para ayudarte en tu caso.

Scott Bentley embodies the best qualities of the best lawyers.

~The courageous morality of Atticus Finch
~The wit and eloquence of Clarence Darrow

Scott Bentley is motivated only by his duty to defend his clients and nothing else.

Other lawyers work to make money or to boost their reputation
- Scott Bentley doesn't even concern himself with his clients' payments
- He's too focused on defending them, no matter what burden may be to himself, never hesitating to throw himself under the bus for the good of any one of his clients

Scott Bentley is the guy you can count on to drop everything for you, always sacrificing his own time to take care of any and every issue that may arise

You don't have to be some righteous, forgiveable, wrongfully accused character to earn his service - Scott Bentley will stand with you no matter who you are or what you've done.

You can stop looking for lawyers... Whatever your legal troubles may be, Scott Bentley is going to save you.

reviews.text: I have had the privilege of working closely with Kendall VanConas of A to Z Law over the years. In every interaction, Kendall has consistently demonstrated the highest level of professionalism and productivity. Both she and her team have been incredibly accommodating, not only to me but also to my clients. I would highly recommend Kendall to anyone seeking expert legal advice without hesitation.
Very responsive, good listeners, excellent advice.
Kendall is always great to work with.  I truly appreciate the personalized service and client care.

We hired Kendall VanConas and this firm to update our estate - they initially said they'd print our documents and give return them to us in a day or two - instead they took weeks just to print copies of our estate documents and only gave them back weeks later after we had to prompt them and ask for them.

After that, we had to continually call and send emails to repeatedly ask when we were going to ever hear from them about our estate planning after our initial meeting in May, we were told their assistant went on vacation so they were behind and would try to catch up soon (but still never heard anything from them after that), weeks went by and again we reached out to ask when things would move forward and were told Kendall had surgery and had "gotten behind" on things in her recovery (We were never told she was out for a medical leave prior to that). We had to contact them again on July 1st only to be told they were all out of the office until after July 8th - this firm doesn't do work, they do billing and make excuses, that's about it.

They also refused to give us notes from the one meeting we had with them - for which we were billed $750 and told, the notes from that meeting were "privy for them" not for us so our request for a recap of our own estate planning meeting was refused.

Do not waste your time with this firm, they have NO incentive to move forward with your project or estate planning, they will take you as a client then sit on your estate planning and DO NOTHING, but bill you for any meetings, then drop the ball, and you will never hear from them again, very unprofessional and our experience with them was completely frustrating and a total waste of our time, as well as costly - as we got nothing from our $750 meeting with them, not even an outline or meeting recap of the notes they took from our estate planning meeting.

They also don't communicate at all, and never told us about the lead attorney's surgery or time out from the office for her recovery - and apparently, no one else in the firm does anything. (They take a full week off for July 4th - the entire firm apparently, as no one responded to our July 1 email as they were all "out of the office until after July 8th). After July 8th we still heard NOTHING. Kendall told us she would follow up with a timeline of our estate planning status the following week, but she never did, and that never happened.

When they had an assistant out of the office that also apparently makes all their work come to a screeching halt - all of this is inexcusable, unprofessional and is a poor representation of a firm that is supposed to be on their game helping people update their estate planning.

You will likely pass away before they ever get to updating your estate - we moved on and found a much better firm that actually does work, and would strongly recommend people stay away from this firm if they need something done in a reasonable time and feel communication is important at all, as this firm doesn't communicate, they make excuses when you reach out because if you hire them, you will be the one doing all the planning and reaching out, they do not do anything at all but sit on your estate planning and watch time go by!

From the first meeting in May until we fired them in July for a span of almost 2 months, we had one meeting, they copied our files and then absolutely nothing else ever happened in moving forward with our estate planning - they never gave us a timeline for getting it done, which we asked about for 3 weeks, but they never provided a timeline because they had no plan to do the work or had decided for some reason due to their incompetence and lack of continuity in their own office and within their staff's capability to take years to do an update on our estate planning.

This firm is not doing anything but taking business then sitting on it, doing meetings with clients and refusing to give the clients any notes or minutes from meetings clients are being billed for! There are firms that do effective estate planning, but sadly, this isn't one of them.

I had the worst experience dealing with an totally incompetent attorney and this firm. It seemed to me that all they cared about was billing you for services that now I know they did not provide or perform to the best of their abilities as a responsible and diligent counsel should do. Their lack of care and indifference is causing our family much pain and potentially loss of our life’s savings. This is not right and I don’t believe they should be in business if their motivation is solely to line their pockets.

Due to her tenacity and drive, she was successful in getting a lump settlement for past funds due from SSDI and set my wife up so that she will receive monthly payments into the future.  Thumbs up!

Patricia Hall should be your first choice, if you are looking for an attorney who is smart, honest, professional, & empathetic.

Patricia Hall came highly recommended to me by an acquaintance who had achieved a successful outcome.  I was impressed the moment I first met with Patricia, because (unlike other attorneys I'd had in the past), she was completely honest about my chances for a favorable outcome. I was forced to leave my career due to debilitating pain & traveling inflammation, but I was missing a proper diagnosis.  Thankfully I had Patricia Hall in my corner supporting me, while I refused to give up on my search to prove my "truth." After years of searching, a DNA & Genetic testing proved my rare medical disability. Where other attorney's failed after years of minimal efforts, Patricia Hall helped me achieve a favorable decision. Thank you Patty for being patient & believing in me. My family & I are eternally grateful.
